TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: ----------------------------------- -- COST ELIMINATION ----------------------------------- SELECT expenditure_item_id, line_num, creation_date, created_by, transfer_status_code, quantity, billable_flag, program_update_date, pa_date, COST_CODE_COMBINATION_ID, gl_date, recvr_gl_date, reversed_flag, org_id, project_id, null as task_id, null as denom_currency_code, denom_raw_cost, denom_burdened_cost, project_currency_code, project_rev_rate_date, project_rev_rate_type, project_exchange_rate, projfunc_exchange_rate, null as work_type_id, recvr_gl_period_name, recvr_pa_period_name, projfunc_cost_rate_type, projfunc_cost_rate_date, projfunc_currency_code, null as expenditure_item_date, expenditure_type, null as expenditure_org_id, null as job_id, system_linkage_function, null as inventory_item_id, unit_of_measure, incurred_by_person_id, incurred_by_org_id, entered_by_person_id, vendor_id, pa_period_set_name, gl_period_set_name, null as project_role_id, null as resource_org_id, null as non_labor_resource, null as resource_class, WIP_RESOURCE_ID, line_type, PROJFUNC_RAW_COST, PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST, PROJECT_RAW_COST, PROJECT_BURDENED_COST, null as raw_cost_rate, null as burden_cost_rate, bill_job_id, transaction_source, project_type_class_code, x_custom, null as attribute8, denom_raw_cost, cost_burden_distributed_flag, bill_hold_flag, burden_cost, null as cost_dist_rejection_code, null as cc_cross_charge_code, null as cc_ic_processed_code, bill_job_billing_title, attribute2, attribute5, cross_charge_type, control_pu, null as invoice_num, null as invoice_date, null as po_num, null as non_labor_resource, charged_pu, null as cc_prvdr_org_id, null as cc_recvr_org_id, null as job_id, func_curr_code, func_burdened_cost, func_raw_cost, task_customer_id, ae_line_num, source_type, ae_header_id, null as USER_NAME, null as X_ASSIGNED_PU_ID, null as X_ORIG_TRANS_REFERENCE ,JEG_MV_COST_ELIM.X_GL_TRANSFER_DATE ,NULL AS X_EXPENDITURE_END_DATE FROM PROD_MV_BIDATA32.JEG_MV_COST_ELIM

Sql Query
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
SELECT expenditure_item_id, line_num, creation_date, created_by, transfer_status_code, quantity, billable_flag, program_update_date, pa_date, dr_code_combination_id, gl_date, recvr_gl_date, reversed_flag, org_id, project_id, task_id, denom_currency_code, denom_raw_cost, DENOM_BURDENED_COST, project_currency_code, project_rate_date, project_rate_type, project_exchange_rate, projfunc_cost_exchange_rate, work_type_id, --xah.period_name as recvr_gl_period_name, recvr_gl_period_name, --pcdl.pa_period_name as recvr_pa_period_name, recvr_pa_period_name, projfunc_cost_rate_type, projfunc_cost_rate_date, projfunc_currency_code, expenditure_item_date, expenditure_type, expenditure_organization_id, job_id, system_linkage_function, -- peia.inventory_item_id, NULL AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, -- DECODE(peia.UNIT_OF_MEASURE, NULL,PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.UNIT_OF_MEASURE,peia.UNIT_OF_MEASURE) unit_of_measure, -- PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.UNIT_OF_MEASURE, -- PC: is this the right substitute? NEW_UNIT_OF_MEASURE, --pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_person_id, INCURRED_BY_HR_ID, incurred_by_organization_id, --pa_expenditures_all.entered_by_person_id, --entered_by.attribute9 as ENTERED_BY_HR_ID 0 as entered_by, vendor_id, period_set_name, period_set_name1, -- pa_project_assignments.project_role_id, NULL AS PROJECT_ROLE_ID, NULL resource_organization_id, non_labor_resource, resource_class, wip_resource_id, line_type, PROJFUNC_RAW_COST, PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST, PROJECT_RAW_COST, PROJECT_BURDENED_COST, raw_cost_rate, burden_cost_rate, bill_job_id, transaction_source, PROJECT_TYPE_CLASS_CODE, '0' AS X_CUSTOM, attribute8, denom_raw_cost1, cost_burden_distributed_flag, bill_hold_flag, 0 AS BURDEN_COST, cost_dist_rejection_code, cc_cross_charge_code, cc_ic_processed_code, bill_job_billing_title, attribute2, attribute5, cc_cross_charge_type, Controlling_PU, --api.invoice_num, '0' AS INVOICE_NUM, --api.invoice_date, INVOICE_DATE, --poh.segment1 as po_num, '0' as po_num, non_labor_resource1, segment3, cc_prvdr_organization_id, cc_recvr_organization_id, attribute3, func_currency_code, FUNC_BURDENED_COST, FUNC_RAW_COST, customer_id, ae_line_num, source_type, ae_header_id, X_CONVERSION_NAME, X_ASSIGNED_PU_ID, X_ORIG_TRANS_REFERENCE ,JEG_MV_COST_ELIM1.X_GL_TRANSFER_DATE as X_GL_TRANSFER_DATE ,JEG_MV_COST_ELIM1.X_EXPENDITURE_END_DATE as X_EXPENDITURE_END_DATE
FROM JEG_MV_COST_ELIM1

MAPPLET.DESCRIPTION: Extracts project cost distribution data from the source system and will do the necessary cleansing process
MAPPLET.NAME: mplt_BC_ORA_ProjectCostLine

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT /*+ NOPARALLEL */ peia.expenditure_item_id,--USG pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_num, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.creation_date, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.created_by, DECODE(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.transfer_status_code,'B','G', pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.transfer_status_code) transfer_status_code, 0 AS quantity, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.billable_flag, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.program_update_date, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.pa_date, dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id dr_code_combination_id, xal.accounting_date AS gl_date, xal.accounting_date AS recvr_gl_date, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.reversed_flag, pa_projects_all.ORG_ID prj_org_id, --USG pa_projects_all.PROJECT_ID, --USG pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.task_id,--USG pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.denom_currency_code, ( CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.denom_raw_cost ELSE ( CASE WHEN NVL(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(NVL(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) END) AS denom_raw_cost, 0 AS DENOM_BURDENED_COST, pa_projects_all.project_currency_code,--USG pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_rate_date, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_rate_type, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_exchange_rate, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_cost_exchange_rate, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.work_type_id, --xah.period_name, jeg_get_gl_period(NVL(xal.accounting_date,xah.accounting_date),pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.org_id) recvr_gl_period_name, --nvl(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.recvr_pa_period_name,pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.pa_period_name) recvr_pa_period_name, jeg_get_pa_period(NVL(xal.accounting_date,xah.accounting_date),pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.org_id) recvr_pa_period_name, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_cost_rate_type, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_cost_rate_date, pa_projects_all.projfunc_currency_code,--USG peia.expenditure_item_date, peia.EXPENDITURE_TYPE ||jeg_get_iws_rec_project(pa_projects_all.segment1,'L',peia.task_id) expenditure_type,--USG NVL(peia.override_to_organization_id, pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_organization_id) expenditure_organization_id, peia.job_id, peia.system_linkage_function, NULL AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, ( CASE WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'ST' THEN 'HOURS' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG' THEN 'USAGE HOURS' WHEN PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.UNIT_OF_MEASURE = 'MILEAGE' THEN 'MILEAGE' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'VI' THEN 'DOLLARS' ELSE PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.UNIT_OF_MEASURE END) NEW_UNIT_OF_MEASURE, NVL(incurred_by.attribute9,0) AS INCURRED_BY_HR_ID, pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_organization_id, 0 AS entered_by, pa_expenditures_all.vendor_id, pa_implementations_all.period_set_name, gl_ledgers.period_set_name, NULL AS PROJECT_ROLE_ID, NULL resource_organization_id, peia.non_labor_resource, ( CASE WHEN peia.system_linkage_function IN ('ER','PJ','BTC') THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function IN ('OT','ST') THEN 'PEOPLE' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'INV' THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS' WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS' WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND NVL(LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE,'NA') <> 'RATE' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE = 'RATE' AND PA_IMPLEMENTATIONS_ALL.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG='Y' THEN 'PEOPLE' WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE = 'RATE' AND PA_IMPLEMENTATIONS_ALL.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG = 'N' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'WIP' AND BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE = 2 THEN 'PEOPLE' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'WIP' AND BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE = 1 THEN 'EQUIPMENT' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'WIP' AND NVL(BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE,0) NOT IN (1,2) THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG' AND PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG = 'N' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG' AND NVL(PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG,'Y') = 'Y' THEN 'EQUIPMENT' ELSE ' ' END) resource_class, peia.wip_resource_id, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_type, DECODE ( peia.system_linkage_function ,'USG' ,ABS(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.amount) * SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) ) AS PROJFUNC_RAW_COST, --USG pf_Rawcost SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.amount) AS PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST,--USG pf_burden DECODE ( peia.system_linkage_function ,'USG' ,ABS(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_raw_cost) * SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) ) AS PROJECT_RAW_COST, --USG p_rawcost SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(NVL ( pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_burdened_cost ,peia.project_burdened_cost )) AS PROJECT_BURDENED_COST, --USG p_burden peia.raw_cost_rate, peia.burden_cost_rate, peia.bill_job_id, peia.transaction_source, PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE_CLASS_CODE, '0' AS X_CUSTOM, peia.attribute8, ( CASE WHEN NVL(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(NVL(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) AS denom_raw_cost, peia.cost_burden_distributed_flag, peia.bill_hold_flag, 0 AS BURDEN_COST, peia.cost_dist_rejection_code, peia.cc_cross_charge_code, peia.cc_ic_processed_code, peia.bill_job_billing_title, peia.attribute2, peia.attribute5, peia.cc_cross_charge_type, JEG_GET_CLASS(pa_projects_all.PROJECT_ID, 'Controlling Performance Unit','C'), NULL AS INVOICE_NUM, NULL AS INVOICE_DATE, NULL AS po_num, peia.non_labor_resource, TRIM(dr_gl_code_combinations.segment3), peia.cc_prvdr_organization_id, peia.cc_recvr_organization_id, TRIM(peia.attribute3), gl_ledgers.currency_code AS func_currency_code,--USG (NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) AS FUNC_BURDENED_COST,--USG f_burden DECODE ( peia.system_linkage_function ,'USG' ,NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0) ) AS FUNC_RAW_COST, --USG f_Rawcost pa_tasks.customer_id, xal.ae_line_num, 'LABOR_COST' AS source_type, xal.ae_header_id, ( CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS WORKSHARE_FLAG, ( CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN ( CASE WHEN NVL(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(NVL(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) AS PRDR_DENOM_RAW_COST, 0 AS PRDR_DENOM_BURDENED_COST, ( CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN ( CASE WHEN NVL(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(NVL(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) AS PRDR_FUNC_RAW_COST, ( CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN ( CASE WHEN NVL(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(NVL(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.acct_currency_code,pa_projects_all.projfunc_currency_code,xal.accounting_date),0) AS PRDR_PROJFUNC_RAW_COST, ( CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN ( CASE WHEN NVL(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(NVL(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.acct_currency_code,pa_projects_all.project_currency_code,xal.accounting_date),0) AS PRDR_PROJ_RAW_COST, 0 AS PRDR_FUNC_BURDENED_COST, 0 AS PRDR_PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST, 0 AS PRDR_PROJ_BURDENED_COST, ( CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN PA_COST_DISTRIBUTION_LINES_ALL.ACCT_CURRENCY_CODE ELSE NULL END) AS PRDR_ACCT_CURR_CODE , NULL AS non_billable_code1 -- Classfication code P , NULL AS non_billable_code2 -- Classfication code R , NULL AS non_billable_code3 -- Classfication code W , NULL AS non_billable_code4 -- Classfication code C , NULL AS non_billable_code5 -- Classfication code X , 0 AS NB1_Hours -- Classfication Hours P , 0 AS NB2_Hours -- Classfication Hours R , 0 AS NB3_Hours -- Classfication Hours W , 0 AS NB4_Hours -- Classfication Hours C , 0 AS NB5_Hours -- Classfication Hours X , CASE WHEN FND_USER.USER_NAME = 'CONVERSION' OR PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '%CONVERSION%' OR PEIA.EXPENDITURE_TYPE LIKE 'Conv-%' OR PEIA.BILL_GROUP LIKE 'CH2M-CONVERSION%' THEN 'CONVERSION' ELSE NULL END AS X_CONVERSION_NAME , PAAF.ASS_ATTRIBUTE3 AS X_ASSIGNED_PU_ID , PEIA.ORIG_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE AS X_ORIG_TRANS_REFERENCE , CASE WHEN INSTR ( peia.attribute8, 'JMC LC') > 1 THEN NEXT_DAY (pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.pa_Date - 1, 'FRIDAY') END AS X_CORRECTION_DATE , CASE WHEN xah.gl_transfer_status_code ='Y' THEN xah.gl_transfer_Date END AS X_GL_TRANSFER_DATE , pa_expenditures_all.expenditure_ending_date AS X_EXPENDITURE_END_DATE FROM xla_distribution_links XDL , xla_ae_lines XAL , xla_ae_headers XAH , pa_cost_distribution_lines_all pa_cost_distribution_lines_all , pa_expenditure_items_all peia , pa_projects_all pa_projects_all , gl_ledgers gl_ledgers , gl_code_combinations dr_gl_code_combinations --,JEG_PA_AUTO_ACCT_LKP_SET_V PALKP , JEG_PA_ACCT_CATEGORIES PACT /*Newly added tables*/ , pa_expenditures_all , per_all_people_f incurred_by , pa_implementations_all , PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL , PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES , PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES , BOM_RESOURCES , PO_LINES_ALL POL , PO_LINE_TYPES_B LT , pa_tasks , FND_USER , PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F PAAF WHERE XAH.event_type_code IN ('USG_COST_DIST','USG_COST_DIST_ADJ') AND NVL(peia.transaction_source,'x') != 'FA_DEPREN' --added newly for usg transactions AND XAH.ae_header_id IN (SELECT /*+ NOPARALLEL */ GT.ae_header_id FROM xla_ae_headers GT WHERE EXISTS (SELECT /*+ NOPARALLEL */ 1 FROM xla_ae_headers XAH , xla_distribution_links XDL , pa_expenditure_items_all PEI WHERE XAH.ae_header_id = GT.ae_header_id and XAH.application_id = GT.application_id --added by Palani and XDL.application_id = XAH.application_id --added by Palani AND XAH.event_type_code IN ('USG_COST_DIST','USG_COST_DIST_ADJ') AND XDL.ae_header_id = XAH.ae_header_id AND PEI.expenditure_item_id = XDL.source_distribution_id_num_1 AND PEI.system_linkage_function = 'USG' AND EXISTS (SELECT /*+ NOPARALLEL */1 FROM pa_cost_distribution_lines_all CDL WHERE CDL.expenditure_item_id = PEI.expenditure_item_id AND CDL.line_type = 'D' ) AND EXISTS (SELECT /*+ NOPARALLEL */1 FROM pa_cost_distribution_lines_all CDL WHERE CDL.expenditure_item_id = PEI.expenditure_item_id AND CDL.line_type = 'R' ) ) ) AND XAH.ae_header_id = XDL.ae_headeR_id AND FND_USER.USER_ID(+) = peia.CREATED_BY AND XDL.ae_headeR_id = XAL.ae_header_id AND XDL.ae_line_num = XAL.ae_line_num AND XDL.application_id = XAH.application_id -- Added by Palani 05/03/24 AND XAH.ae_header_id = XAL.ae_headeR_id -- Added by Palani 05/03/24 AND XAH.application_id = XDL.application_id -- Added by Palani 05/03/24 AND XAH.application_id = XAL.application_id -- Added by Palani 05/03/24 AND XDL.application_id = XAL.application_id -- Added by Palani 05/03/24 --AND TRUNC(XAL.CREATION_DATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(l_last_completion_Date) -- AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) --AND peia.org_id = p_org_id AND XDL.source_distribution_id_num_1 = pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.expenditure_item_id AND XDL.source_distribution_id_num_2 = pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_num AND (pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_type = 'R' AND peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG') AND XAL.accounting_class_code = 'COST' AND pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.expenditure_item_id = peia.expenditure_item_id AND peia.project_id = pa_projects_all.project_id --AND XAL.ledger_id = gl_ledgers.ledger_id -- commented by Palani 05/03/24 AND XAH.ledger_id = gl_ledgers.ledger_id -- Added by Palani 05/03/24 --AND XAL.code_combination_id = dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id --AND 'EType||SType Sup Inv Rev DIR' = -- PALKP.segment_Value_lookup_set_name(+) --AND peia.EXPENDITURE_ITEM_ID = -- PALKP.expenditure_item_id(+) AND gl_ledgers.LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE = 'PRIMARY' AND dr_gl_code_combinations.SEGMENT2 BETWEEN PACT.ACCOUNT_FROM(+) AND PACT.ACCOUNT_TO(+) AND PACT.TYPE(+) IS NOT NULL AND dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id = (SELECT NVL ( (CDL2.dr_code_combination_id) ,-1 --pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.dr_code_combination_id ) FROM pa_cost_Distribution_lines_all CDL2 WHERE CDL2.expenditure_item_id = pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.expenditure_item_id AND CDL2.line_type = 'D' AND ROWNUM = 1 ) /*Newly added joins*/ AND peia.expenditure_id = pa_expenditures_all.expenditure_id AND pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_person_id = incurred_by.person_id (+) AND pa_expenditures_all.creation_date <= incurred_by.effective_end_date (+) AND pa_expenditures_all.creation_date >= incurred_by.effective_start_date (+) AND pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_person_id = PAAF.person_id (+) AND TRUNC(pa_expenditures_all.creation_date) <= TRUNC(PAAF.effective_end_date (+)) AND TRUNC(pa_expenditures_all.creation_date) >= TRUNC(PAAF.effective_start_date (+)) AND pa_implementations_all.org_id = pa_projects_all.org_id AND PA_PROJECTS_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE = PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE AND PA_PROJECTS_ALL.ORG_ID = PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.ORG_ID AND peia.EXPENDITURE_TYPE = PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.EXPENDITURE_TYPE AND peia.non_labor_resource = PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.non_labor_resource (+) AND peia.wip_resource_id = BOM_RESOURCES.resource_id (+) AND peia.PO_LINE_ID = POL.PO_LINE_ID (+) AND POL.LINE_TYPE_ID = LT.LINE_TYPE_ID (+) AND peia.task_id = pa_tasks.task_id (+) AND XAL.ACCOUNTING_DATE >= to_date('10/01/2016', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AND ( XAH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE >= to_date('03/03/2024 00:00:00', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') OR peia.LAST_UPDATE_DATE >= to_date('03/03/2024 00:00:00', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')) --AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ($$X_DIVESTCO_SQL) SQ WHERE SQ.PROJECT_NUMBER = pa_projects_all.SEGMENT1 )--Added for Divestiture logic. UNION ALL --R Flow 2nd union EBS SELECT /*+ NOPARALLEL */peia.expenditure_item_id,--USG pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_num, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.creation_date, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.created_by, DECODE(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.transfer_status_code,'B','G', pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.transfer_status_code) transfer_status_code, 0 AS quantity, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.billable_flag, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.program_update_date, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.pa_date, dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id dr_code_combination_id, xal.accounting_date AS gl_date, xal.accounting_date AS recvr_gl_date, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.reversed_flag, pa_projects_all.ORG_ID prj_org_id, --USG pa_projects_all.PROJECT_ID, --USG pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.task_id,--USG pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.denom_currency_code, ( CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.denom_raw_cost ELSE ( CASE WHEN NVL(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(NVL(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) END) AS denom_raw_cost, 0 AS DENOM_BURDENED_COST, peia.project_currency_code,--USG pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_rate_date, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_rate_type, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_exchange_rate, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_cost_exchange_rate, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.work_type_id, --xah.period_name, jeg_get_gl_period(NVL(xal.accounting_date,xah.accounting_date),pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.org_id) recvr_gl_period_name, --nvl(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.recvr_pa_period_name,pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.pa_period_name) recvr_pa_period_name, jeg_get_pa_period(NVL(xal.accounting_date,xah.accounting_date),pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.org_id) recvr_pa_period_name, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_cost_rate_type, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_cost_rate_date, peia.projfunc_currency_code,--USG peia.expenditure_item_date, peia.EXPENDITURE_TYPE ||jeg_get_iws_rec_project(pa_projects_all.segment1,'L',peia.task_id) expenditure_type,--USG NVL(peia.override_to_organization_id, pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_organization_id) expenditure_organization_id, peia.job_id, peia.system_linkage_function, NULL AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, ( CASE WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'ST' THEN 'HOURS' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG' THEN 'USAGE HOURS' WHEN PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.UNIT_OF_MEASURE = 'MILEAGE' THEN 'MILEAGE' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'VI' THEN 'DOLLARS' ELSE PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.UNIT_OF_MEASURE END) NEW_UNIT_OF_MEASURE, NVL(incurred_by.attribute9,0) AS INCURRED_BY_HR_ID, pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_organization_id, 0 AS entered_by, pa_expenditures_all.vendor_id, pa_implementations_all.period_set_name, gl_ledgers.period_set_name, NULL AS PROJECT_ROLE_ID, NULL resource_organization_id, peia.non_labor_resource, ( CASE WHEN peia.system_linkage_function IN ('ER','PJ','BTC') THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function IN ('OT','ST') THEN 'PEOPLE' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'INV' THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS' WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS' WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND NVL(LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE,'NA') <> 'RATE' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE = 'RATE' AND PA_IMPLEMENTATIONS_ALL.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG='Y' THEN 'PEOPLE' WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE = 'RATE' AND PA_IMPLEMENTATIONS_ALL.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG = 'N' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'WIP' AND BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE = 2 THEN 'PEOPLE' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'WIP' AND BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE = 1 THEN 'EQUIPMENT' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'WIP' AND NVL(BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE,0) NOT IN (1,2) THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG' AND PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG = 'N' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG' AND NVL(PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG,'Y') = 'Y' THEN 'EQUIPMENT' ELSE ' ' END) resource_class, peia.wip_resource_id, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_type, DECODE ( peia.system_linkage_function ,'USG' ,ABS(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.amount) * SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) ) * -1 AS PROJFUNC_RAW_COST, --USG pf_Rawcost SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.amount) * -1 AS PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST,--USG pf_burden DECODE ( peia.system_linkage_function ,'USG' ,ABS(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_raw_cost) * SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) ) * -1 AS PROJECT_RAW_COST, --USG p_rawcost SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(NVL ( pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_burdened_cost ,peia.project_burdened_cost )) * -1 AS PROJECT_BURDENED_COST, --USG p_burden peia.raw_cost_rate, peia.burden_cost_rate, peia.bill_job_id, peia.transaction_source, PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE_CLASS_CODE, '0' AS X_CUSTOM, peia.attribute8, ( CASE WHEN NVL(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(NVL(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) AS denom_raw_cost, peia.cost_burden_distributed_flag, peia.bill_hold_flag, 0 AS BURDEN_COST, peia.cost_dist_rejection_code, peia.cc_cross_charge_code, peia.cc_ic_processed_code, peia.bill_job_billing_title, peia.attribute2, peia.attribute5, peia.cc_cross_charge_type, JEG_GET_CLASS(pa_projects_all.PROJECT_ID, 'Controlling Performance Unit','C'), NULL AS INVOICE_NUM, NULL AS INVOICE_DATE, NULL AS po_num, peia.non_labor_resource, TRIM(dr_gl_code_combinations.segment3), peia.cc_prvdr_organization_id, peia.cc_recvr_organization_id, TRIM(peia.attribute3), gl_ledgers.currency_code AS func_currency_code,--USG (NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) * -1 AS FUNC_BURDENED_COST,--USG f_burden DECODE ( peia.system_linkage_function ,'USG' ,NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0) ) *-1 AS FUNC_RAW_COST, --USG f_Rawcost pa_tasks.customer_id, xal.ae_line_num, 'LABOR_COST' AS source_type, xal.ae_header_id, ( CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS WORKSHARE_FLAG, ( CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN ( CASE WHEN NVL(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(NVL(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) AS PRDR_DENOM_RAW_COST, 0 AS PRDR_DENOM_BURDENED_COST, ( CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN ( CASE WHEN NVL(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(NVL(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) AS PRDR_FUNC_RAW_COST, ( CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN ( CASE WHEN NVL(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(NVL(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.acct_currency_code,pa_projects_all.projfunc_currency_code,xal.accounting_date),0) AS PRDR_PROJFUNC_RAW_COST, ( CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN ( CASE WHEN NVL(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(NVL(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.acct_currency_code,pa_projects_all.project_currency_code,xal.accounting_date),0) AS PRDR_PROJ_RAW_COST, 0 AS PRDR_FUNC_BURDENED_COST, 0 AS PRDR_PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST, 0 AS PRDR_PROJ_BURDENED_COST, ( CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN PA_COST_DISTRIBUTION_LINES_ALL.ACCT_CURRENCY_CODE ELSE NULL END) AS PRDR_ACCT_CURR_CODE , NULL AS non_billable_code1 -- Classfication code P , NULL AS non_billable_code2 -- Classfication code R , NULL AS non_billable_code3 -- Classfication code W , NULL AS non_billable_code4 -- Classfication code C , NULL AS non_billable_code5 -- Classfication code X , 0 AS NB1_Hours -- Classfication Hours P , 0 AS NB2_Hours -- Classfication Hours R , 0 AS NB3_Hours -- Classfication Hours W , 0 AS NB4_Hours -- Classfication Hours C , 0 AS NB5_Hours -- Classfication Hours X , CASE WHEN FND_USER.USER_NAME = 'CONVERSION' OR PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '%CONVERSION%' OR PEIA.EXPENDITURE_TYPE LIKE 'Conv-%' OR PEIA.BILL_GROUP LIKE 'CH2M-CONVERSION%' THEN 'CONVERSION' ELSE NULL END AS X_CONVERSION_NAME , PAAF.ASS_ATTRIBUTE3 AS X_ASSIGNED_PU_ID , peia.ORIG_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE AS X_ORIG_TRANS_REFERENCE , CASE WHEN INSTR ( peia.attribute8, 'JMC LC') > 1 THEN NEXT_DAY (pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.pa_Date - 1, 'FRIDAY') END AS X_CORRECTION_DATE , CASE WHEN xah.gl_transfer_status_code ='Y' THEN xah.gl_transfer_Date END AS X_GL_TRANSFER_DATE , pa_expenditures_all.expenditure_ending_date AS X_EXPENDITURE_END_DATE FROM xla_distribution_links XDL , xla_ae_lines XAL , xla_ae_headers XAH , pa_cost_distribution_lines_all pa_cost_distribution_lines_all , pa_expenditure_items_all peia , pa_projects_all pa_projects_all , gl_ledgers gl_ledgers , gl_code_combinations dr_gl_code_combinations --,JEG_PA_AUTO_ACCT_LKP_SET_V PALKP , JEG_PA_ACCT_CATEGORIES PACT /*Newly added tables*/ , pa_expenditures_all , per_all_people_f incurred_by , pa_implementations_all , PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL , PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES , PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES , BOM_RESOURCES , PO_LINES_ALL POL , PO_LINE_TYPES_B LT , pa_tasks , FND_USER , PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F PAAF WHERE XAH.event_type_code IN ('USG_COST_DIST','USG_COST_DIST_ADJ') --added newly for usg transactions AND XAH.ae_header_id IN (SELECT /*+ NOPARALLEL */GT.ae_header_id FROM xla_ae_headers GT WHERE EXISTS (SELECT /*+ NOPARALLEL */1 FROM xla_ae_headers XAH , xla_distribution_links XDL , pa_expenditure_items_all PEI WHERE XAH.ae_header_id = GT.ae_header_id and XAH.application_id = GT.application_id --added by Palani and XDL.application_id = XAH.application_id --added by Palani AND XAH.event_type_code IN ('USG_COST_DIST','USG_COST_DIST_ADJ') AND XDL.ae_header_id = XAH.ae_header_id AND PEI.expenditure_item_id = XDL.source_distribution_id_num_1 AND PEI.system_linkage_function = 'USG' AND EXISTS (SELECT /*+ NOPARALLEL */1 FROM pa_cost_distribution_lines_all CDL WHERE CDL.expenditure_item_id = PEI.expenditure_item_id AND CDL.line_type = 'D' ) AND EXISTS (SELECT /*+ NOPARALLEL */ 1 FROM pa_cost_distribution_lines_all CDL WHERE CDL.expenditure_item_id = PEI.expenditure_item_id AND CDL.line_type = 'R' ) ) ) -- AND peia.transaction_source != 'FA_DEPREN' AND NVL(peia.transaction_source,'x') != 'FA_DEPREN' AND XAH.ae_header_id = XDL.ae_headeR_id AND FND_USER.USER_ID(+) = peia.CREATED_BY AND XDL.ae_headeR_id = XAL.ae_header_id AND XDL.ae_line_num = XAL.ae_line_num AND XDL.application_id = XAH.application_id -- Added by Palani 05/03/24 AND XAH.ae_header_id = XAL.ae_headeR_id -- Added by Palani 05/03/24 AND XAH.application_id = XDL.application_id -- Added by Palani 05/03/24 AND XAH.application_id = XAL.application_id -- Added by Palani 05/03/24 AND XDL.application_id = XAL.application_id -- Added by Palani 05/03/24 AND XDL.source_distribution_id_num_1 = pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.expenditure_item_id AND XDL.source_distribution_id_num_2 = pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_num AND (pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_type = 'R' AND peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG') AND XAL.accounting_class_code = 'COST' AND pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.expenditure_item_id = peia.expenditure_item_id AND peia.attribute6 = pa_projects_all.segment1 --AND XAL.ledger_id = gl_ledgers.ledger_id -- commented by Palani 05/03/24 AND XAH.ledger_id = gl_ledgers.ledger_id -- Added by Palani 05/03/24 AND gl_ledgers.LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE = 'PRIMARY' AND dr_gl_code_combinations.SEGMENT2 BETWEEN PACT.ACCOUNT_FROM(+) AND PACT.ACCOUNT_TO(+) AND PACT.TYPE(+) IS NOT NULL AND dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id = pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.cr_code_combination_id /*Newly added joins*/ AND peia.expenditure_id = pa_expenditures_all.expenditure_id AND pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_person_id = incurred_by.person_id (+) AND pa_expenditures_all.creation_date <= incurred_by.effective_end_date (+) AND pa_expenditures_all.creation_date >= incurred_by.effective_start_date (+) AND pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_person_id = PAAF.person_id (+) AND TRUNC(pa_expenditures_all.creation_date) <= TRUNC(PAAF.effective_end_date (+)) AND TRUNC(pa_expenditures_all.creation_date) >= TRUNC(PAAF.effective_start_date (+)) AND pa_implementations_all.org_id = pa_projects_all.org_id AND PA_PROJECTS_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE = PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE AND PA_PROJECTS_ALL.ORG_ID = PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.ORG_ID AND peia.EXPENDITURE_TYPE = PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.EXPENDITURE_TYPE AND peia.non_labor_resource = PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.non_labor_resource (+) AND peia.wip_resource_id = BOM_RESOURCES.resource_id (+) AND peia.PO_LINE_ID = POL.PO_LINE_ID (+) AND POL.LINE_TYPE_ID = LT.LINE_TYPE_ID (+) AND peia.task_id = pa_tasks.task_id (+) AND XAL.ACCOUNTING_DATE >= to_date('10/01/2016', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AND ( XAH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE >= to_date('03/03/2024 00:00:00', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') OR peia.LAST_UPDATE_DATE >= to_date('03/03/2024 00:00:00', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')) --AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ($$X_DIVESTCO_SQL) SQ ----WHERE SQ.PROJECT_NUMBER = pa_projects_all.SEGMENT1 )--Added for Divestiture logic.

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Source Filter
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: PA_EXPENDITURE_ITEMS_ALL.EXPENDITURE_TYPE = PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.EXPENDITURE_TYPE AND pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.expenditure_item_id = pa_expenditure_items_all.expenditure_item_id AND pa_expenditure_items_all.expenditure_id = pa_expenditures_all.expenditure_id AND pa_projects_all.project_id = pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_id AND pa_lookups.lookup_code = pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_type AND pa_lookups.lookup_type = 'COST DISTRIBUTION LINE TYPE' AND pa_implementations_all.org_id = pa_projects_all.org_id AND gl_sets_of_books.set_of_books_id = pa_implementations_all.set_of_books_id AND PA_PROJECTS_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE = PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE AND PA_PROJECTS_ALL.ORG_ID = PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.ORG_ID AND PA_EXPENDITURE_ITEMS_ALL.assignment_id = PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.assignment_id (+) AND PA_EXPENDITURE_ITEMS_ALL.non_labor_resource = PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.non_labor_resource (+) AND PA_EXPENDITURE_ITEMS_ALL.wip_resource_id = BOM_RESOURCES.resource_id (+) AND PA_EXPENDITURE_ITEMS_ALL.PO_LINE_ID = POL.PO_LINE_ID (+) AND POL.LINE_TYPE_ID = LT.LINE_TYPE_ID (+)

Sql Query
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
SELECT /*+ use_hash(JEG_MV_COST_PA,JEG_MV_COST_XLA) parallel(JEG_MV_COST_PA, 4) NOLOGGING*/ distinct JEG_MV_COST_PA.EID, JEG_MV_COST_PA.line_num, JEG_MV_COST_PA.creation_date_dl, JEG_MV_COST_PA.created_by_dl, decode(JEG_MV_COST_PA.transfer_status_code, 'B', 'G', JEG_MV_COST_PA.transfer_status_code) transfer_status_code, DECODE(JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function,'ST',SIGN(NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(JEG_MV_COST_PA.quantity)) AS HOURS, JEG_MV_COST_PA.billable_flag, JEG_MV_COST_PA.program_update_date, JEG_MV_COST_PA.pa_date, JEG_MV_COST_XLA.code_combination_id dr_code_combination_id, JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xal as gl_date, JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xal as recvr_gl_date, JEG_MV_COST_PA.reversed_flag, JEG_MV_COST_PA.org_id, JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_id, JEG_MV_COST_PA.task_id, JEG_MV_COST_PA.denom_currency_code, 0 as denom_raw_cost, (CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.denom_burdened_cost ELSE (CASE WHEN nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN JEG_MV_COST_XLA.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.entered_cr,0)) END) END) as denom_burdened_cost, JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_currency_code, JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_rate_date, JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_rate_type, JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_exchange_rate, JEG_MV_COST_PA.projfunc_cost_exchange_rate, JEG_MV_COST_PA.work_type_id, apps.jeg_get_gl_period(nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xal,JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xal),JEG_MV_COST_PA.org_id) recvr_gl_period_name, apps.jeg_get_pa_period(nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xal,JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xal),JEG_MV_COST_PA.org_id) recvr_pa_period_name, JEG_MV_COST_PA.projfunc_cost_rate_type, JEG_MV_COST_PA.projfunc_cost_rate_date, JEG_MV_COST_PA.projfunc_currency_code, JEG_MV_COST_PA.expenditure_item_date, JEG_MV_COST_PA.expenditure_type, JEG_MV_COST_PA.expenditure_organization_id, JEG_MV_COST_PA.job_id, JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function, NULL AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, JEG_MV_COST_PA.NEW_UNIT_OF_MEASURE, NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.INCURRED_BY_HR_ID,0) as INCURRED_BY_HR_ID, JEG_MV_COST_PA.incurred_by_organization_id, 0 as entered_by, JEG_MV_COST_PA.vendor_id, JEG_MV_COST_PA.period_set_name, JEG_MV_COST_XLA.period_set_name, NULL AS PROJECT_ROLE_ID, null resource_organization_id, JEG_MV_COST_PA.non_labor_resource, (CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function IN ('ER','PJ','BTC') THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function IN ('OT','ST') THEN 'PEOPLE' WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function = 'INV' THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS' WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS' WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE,'NA') <> 'RATE' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE = 'RATE' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG='Y' THEN 'PEOPLE' WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE = 'RATE' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG = 'N' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function = 'WIP' AND NVL(null,0) NOT IN (1,2) THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function = 'USG' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG = 'N' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function = 'USG' AND NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG,'Y') = 'Y' THEN 'EQUIPMENT' ELSE ' ' END) resource_class, JEG_MV_COST_PA.wip_resource_id, JEG_MV_COST_PA.line_type,
0 AS PROJFUNC_RAW_COST,
CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN SIGN(NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(JEG_MV_COST_PA.amount) ELSE ((CASE WHEN nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN JEG_MV_COST_XLA.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.entered_cr,0)) END) * NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.PROJFUNC_COST_EXCHANGE_RATE,1)) END AS PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST,
0 AS PROJECT_RAW_COST,
CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN SIGN(NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_burdened_cost, JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_burdened_cost)) ELSE ((CASE WHEN nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN JEG_MV_COST_XLA.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.entered_cr,0)) END) * NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.PROJECT_EXCHANGE_RATE,1)) END AS PROJECT_BURDENED_COST,
JEG_MV_COST_PA.raw_cost_rate, JEG_MV_COST_PA.burden_cost_rate, JEG_MV_COST_PA.bill_job_id, JEG_MV_COST_PA.transaction_source, JEG_MV_COST_PA.PROJECT_TYPE_CLASS_CODE, '0' AS X_CUSTOM, JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute8, 0 as denom_raw_cost, JEG_MV_COST_PA.cost_burden_distributed_flag, JEG_MV_COST_PA.bill_hold_flag, (CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.dr_code_combination_id||JEG_MV_COST_XLA.ae_line_num = MIN(JEG_MV_COST_PA.dr_code_combination_id||JEG_MV_COST_XLA.ae_line_num) OVER( PARTITION BY JEG_MV_COST_XLA.source_distribution_id_num_1, JEG_MV_COST_XLA.source_distribution_id_num_1 ORDER BY JEG_MV_COST_XLA.ae_line_num RANGE UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) THEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.burden_cost ELSE 0 END) AS BURDEN_COST, JEG_MV_COST_PA.cost_dist_rejection_code, JEG_MV_COST_PA.cc_cross_charge_code, JEG_MV_COST_PA.cc_ic_processed_code, JEG_MV_COST_PA.bill_job_billing_title, JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute2, JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute5, JEG_MV_COST_PA.cc_cross_charge_type, JEG_MV_COST_PA.JEG_GET_CLASS_FUN, NULL AS INVOICE_NUM, NULL AS INVOICE_DATE, null as po_num, JEG_MV_COST_PA.non_labor_resource, TRIM(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.gl_code_segment3) gl_code_segment3, JEG_MV_COST_PA.cc_prvdr_organization_id, JEG_MV_COST_PA.cc_recvr_organization_id, TRIM(JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute3) peia_attribute3, JEG_MV_COST_XLA.func_currency_code as func_currency_code, CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN (sign(nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_dr, 0) - nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(JEG_MV_COST_PA.ACCT_BURDENED_COST)) ELSE (CASE WHEN nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr,0)) END) END AS FUNC_BURDENED_COST, 0 AS FUNC_RAW_COST, JEG_MV_COST_PA.customer_id, JEG_MV_COST_XLA.ae_line_num, 'LABOR_COST' as source_type, JEG_MV_COST_XLA.ae_header_id, (CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS WORKSHARE_FLAG, 0 AS PRDR_DENOM_RAW_COST, (CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN (CASE WHEN nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN JEG_MV_COST_XLA.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.entered_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) AS PRDR_DENOM_BURDENED_COST, 0 AS PRDR_FUNC_RAW_COST, 0 AS PRDR_PROJFUNC_RAW_COST, 0 AS PRDR_PROJ_RAW_COST, (CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN (CASE WHEN nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) AS PRDR_FUNC_BURDENED_COST, (CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN (CASE WHEN nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) * NVL(apps.jeg_get_corporate_rate(JEG_MV_COST_PA.acct_currency_code,JEG_MV_COST_PA.projfunc_currency_code,JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xal),0) AS PRDR_PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST, (CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN (CASE WHEN nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) * NVL(apps.jeg_get_corporate_rate(JEG_MV_COST_PA.acct_currency_code,JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_currency_code,JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xal),0) AS PRDR_PROJ_BURDENED_COST, (CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.ACCT_CURRENCY_CODE ELSE NULL END) AS PRDR_ACCT_CURR_CODE, non_billable_code1 -- Classfication code P ,non_billable_code2 -- Classfication code R ,non_billable_code3 -- Classfication code W ,non_billable_code4 -- Classfication code C ,non_billable_code5 -- Classfication code X ,apps.jeg_pa_nonb_hours(JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute8,apps.jeg_nonbillable_code('01'),SIGN((NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_Dr,0) - NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr,0))),JEG_MV_COST_PA.org_id,JEG_MV_COST_PA.billable_flag) AS NB1_Hours -- Classfication Hours P ,apps.jeg_pa_nonb_hours(JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute8,apps.jeg_nonbillable_code('02'),SIGN((NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_Dr,0) - NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr,0))),JEG_MV_COST_PA.org_id,JEG_MV_COST_PA.billable_flag) AS NB2_Hours -- Classfication Hours R ,apps.jeg_pa_nonb_hours(JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute8,apps.jeg_nonbillable_code('03'),SIGN((NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_Dr,0) - NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr,0))),JEG_MV_COST_PA.org_id,JEG_MV_COST_PA.billable_flag) AS NB3_Hours -- Classfication Hours W ,apps.jeg_pa_nonb_hours(JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute8,apps.jeg_nonbillable_code('04'),SIGN((NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_Dr,0) - NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr,0))),JEG_MV_COST_PA.org_id,JEG_MV_COST_PA.billable_flag) AS NB4_Hours -- Classfication Hours C ,apps.jeg_pa_nonb_hours(JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute8,apps.jeg_nonbillable_code('05'),SIGN((NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_Dr,0) - NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr,0))),JEG_MV_COST_PA.org_id,JEG_MV_COST_PA.billable_flag) AS NB5_Hours -- Classfication Hours X
,CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.USER_NAME = 'CONVERSION' OR JEG_MV_COST_PA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '%CONVERSION%' OR JEG_MV_COST_PA.EXPENDITURE_TYPE LIKE 'Conv-%' OR JEG_MV_COST_PA.BILL_GROUP LIKE 'CH2M-CONVERSION%' THEN 'CONVERSION' ELSE NULL END AS X_CONVERSION_NAME ,JEG_MV_COST_PA.X_ASSIGNED_PU_ID AS X_ASSIGNED_PU_ID ,JEG_MV_COST_PA.X_ORIG_TRANS_REFERENCE ,JEG_MV_COST_PA.X_CORRECTION_DATE AS X_CORRECTION_DATE ,JEG_MV_COST_PA.X_GL_TRANSFER_DATE AS X_GL_TRANSFER_DATE ,JEG_MV_COST_PA.X_EXPENDITURE_END_DATE AS X_EXPENDITURE_END_DATE
FROM JEG_MV_COST_PA JEG_MV_COST_PA, JEG_MV_COST_XLA JEG_MV_COST_XLA where JEG_MV_COST_PA.EID = JEG_MV_COST_XLA.source_distribution_id_num_1 AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.line_num = JEG_MV_COST_XLA.source_distribution_id_num_2 and JEG_MV_COST_PA.line_type=JEG_MV_COST_XLA.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_TYPE AND JEG_MV_COST_XLA.APPLICATION_ID=275--Today AND JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_class_code IN ('COST','PROVIDER_COST','RECEIVER_COST')--today AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function in('PJ','ST')--Today VI,USG and JEG_MV_COST_PA.line_type='D'

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections
Sql Query
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE: ----------------------------------- -- COST ELIMINATION ----------------------------------- SELECT expenditure_item_id, line_num, creation_date, created_by, transfer_status_code, quantity, billable_flag, program_update_date, pa_date, COST_CODE_COMBINATION_ID, gl_date, recvr_gl_date, reversed_flag, org_id, project_id, null as task_id, null as denom_currency_code, denom_raw_cost, denom_burdened_cost, project_currency_code, project_rev_rate_date, project_rev_rate_type, project_exchange_rate, projfunc_exchange_rate, null as work_type_id, recvr_gl_period_name, recvr_pa_period_name, projfunc_cost_rate_type, projfunc_cost_rate_date, projfunc_currency_code, null as expenditure_item_date, expenditure_type, null as expenditure_org_id, null as job_id, system_linkage_function, null as inventory_item_id, unit_of_measure, incurred_by_person_id, incurred_by_org_id, entered_by_person_id, vendor_id, pa_period_set_name, gl_period_set_name, null as project_role_id, null as resource_org_id, null as non_labor_resource, null as resource_class, WIP_RESOURCE_ID, line_type, PROJFUNC_RAW_COST, PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST, PROJECT_RAW_COST, PROJECT_BURDENED_COST, null as raw_cost_rate, null as burden_cost_rate, bill_job_id, transaction_source, project_type_class_code, x_custom, null as attribute8, denom_raw_cost, cost_burden_distributed_flag, bill_hold_flag, burden_cost, null as cost_dist_rejection_code, null as cc_cross_charge_code, null as cc_ic_processed_code, bill_job_billing_title, attribute2, attribute5, cross_charge_type, control_pu, null as invoice_num, null as invoice_date, null as po_num, null as non_labor_resource, charged_pu, null as cc_prvdr_org_id, null as cc_recvr_org_id, null as job_id, func_curr_code, func_burdened_cost, func_raw_cost, task_customer_id, ae_line_num, source_type, ae_header_id, null as USER_NAME, null as X_ASSIGNED_PU_ID, null as X_ORIG_TRANS_REFERENCE ,JEG_MV_COST_ELIM.X_GL_TRANSFER_DATE ,NULL AS X_EXPENDITURE_END_DATE FROM JEG_MV_COST_ELIM

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections
Sql Query
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
-- LABOR DATA 'R' RAW LINES SELECT pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.expenditure_item_id, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_num, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.creation_date, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.created_by, decode(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.transfer_status_code,'B','G', pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.transfer_status_code) transfer_status_code, 0 as quantity, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.billable_flag, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.program_update_date, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.pa_date, --(CASE WHEN pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_type = 'C' THEN pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.cr_code_combination_id ELSE pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.dr_code_combination_id END) dr_code_combination_id, dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id dr_code_combination_id, --nvl(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.recvr_gl_date,pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.gl_date) recvr_gl_date, xal.accounting_date as gl_date, xal.accounting_date as recvr_gl_date, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.reversed_flag, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.org_id, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_id, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.task_id, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.denom_currency_code, (CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS' THEN pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.denom_raw_cost ELSE (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) END) as denom_raw_cost, 0 AS DENOM_BURDENED_COST, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_currency_code, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_rate_date, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_rate_type, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_exchange_rate, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_cost_exchange_rate, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.work_type_id, --nvl(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.recvr_gl_period_name,pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.gl_period_name) recvr_gl_period_name, --xah.period_name, jeg_get_gl_period (nvl(xal.accounting_date,xah.accounting_date),pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.org_id) recvr_gl_period_name, --nvl(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.recvr_pa_period_name,pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.pa_period_name) recvr_pa_period_name, jeg_get_pa_period (nvl(xal.accounting_date,xah.accounting_date),pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.org_id) recvr_pa_period_name, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_cost_rate_type, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_cost_rate_date, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_currency_code, peia.expenditure_item_date, peia.expenditure_type, nvl(peia.override_to_organization_id, pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_organization_id) expenditure_organization_id, peia.job_id, peia.system_linkage_function, -- peia.inventory_item_id, NULL AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, -- DECODE(peia.UNIT_OF_MEASURE, NULL,PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.UNIT_OF_MEASURE,peia.UNIT_OF_MEASURE) unit_of_measure, (CASE WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'ST' THEN 'HOURS' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG' THEN 'USAGE HOURS' WHEN PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.UNIT_OF_MEASURE = 'MILEAGE' THEN 'MILEAGE' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'VI' THEN 'DOLLARS' ELSE PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.UNIT_OF_MEASURE END) NEW_UNIT_OF_MEASURE, --pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_person_id, NVL(incurred_by.attribute9,0) as INCURRED_BY_HR_ID, pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_organization_id, --pa_expenditures_all.entered_by_person_id, --entered_by.attribute9 as ENTERED_BY_HR_ID 0 as entered_by, pa_expenditures_all.vendor_id, pa_implementations_all.period_set_name, gl_ledgers.period_set_name, -- pa_project_assignments.project_role_id, NULL AS PROJECT_ROLE_ID, null resource_organization_id, peia.non_labor_resource, (CASE WHEN peia.system_linkage_function IN ('ER','PJ','BTC') THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function IN ('OT','ST') THEN 'PEOPLE' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'INV' THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS' WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS' WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND NVL(LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE,'NA') <> 'RATE' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE = 'RATE' AND PA_IMPLEMENTATIONS_ALL.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG='Y' THEN 'PEOPLE' WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE = 'RATE' AND PA_IMPLEMENTATIONS_ALL.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG = 'N' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'WIP' AND BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE = 2 THEN 'PEOPLE' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'WIP' AND BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE = 1 THEN 'EQUIPMENT' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'WIP' AND NVL(BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE,0) NOT IN (1,2) THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG' AND PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG = 'N' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG' AND NVL(PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG,'Y') = 'Y' THEN 'EQUIPMENT' ELSE ' ' END) resource_class, peia.wip_resource_id, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_type, CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS' THEN SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.amount) ELSE ((CASE WHEN nvl(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) * NVL(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.PROJFUNC_COST_EXCHANGE_RATE,1)) END AS PROJFUNC_RAW_COST, --(CASE WHEN nvl(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) * NVL(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.PROJFUNC_COST_EXCHANGE_RATE,1) AS PROJFUNC_RAW_COST, 0 AS PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST, CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS' THEN SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(NVL(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_raw_cost, peia.project_raw_cost)) ELSE ((CASE WHEN nvl(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) * NVL(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.PROJECT_EXCHANGE_RATE,1)) END AS PROJECT_RAW_COST, --(CASE WHEN nvl(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) * NVL(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.PROJECT_EXCHANGE_RATE,1) AS PROJECT_RAW_COST, --nvl(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.PROJECT_BURDENED_COST,pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.DENOM_BURDENED_COST) project_burdened_cost, 0 AS PROJECT_BURDENED_COST, peia.raw_cost_rate, peia.burden_cost_rate, peia.bill_job_id, peia.transaction_source, PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE_CLASS_CODE, '0' AS X_CUSTOM, peia.attribute8, (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) as denom_raw_cost, peia.cost_burden_distributed_flag, peia.bill_hold_flag, 0 AS BURDEN_COST, peia.cost_dist_rejection_code, peia.cc_cross_charge_code, peia.cc_ic_processed_code, peia.bill_job_billing_title, peia.attribute2, peia.attribute5, peia.cc_cross_charge_type, JEG_GET_CLASS (pa_projects_all.PROJECT_ID, 'Controlling Performance Unit','C'), --api.invoice_num, NULL AS INVOICE_NUM, --api.invoice_date, NULL AS INVOICE_DATE, --poh.segment1 as po_num, NULL as po_num, peia.non_labor_resource, TRIM(dr_gl_code_combinations.segment3), peia.cc_prvdr_organization_id, peia.cc_recvr_organization_id, TRIM(peia.attribute3), gl_ledgers.currency_code as func_currency_code, 0 AS FUNC_BURDENED_COST, (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) AS FUNC_RAW_COST, pa_tasks.customer_id, xal.ae_line_num, 'LABOR_COST' as source_type, xal.ae_header_id, (CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS WORKSHARE_FLAG, (CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS' THEN (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) AS PRDR_DENOM_RAW_COST, 0 AS PRDR_DENOM_BURDENED_COST, (CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS' THEN (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) AS PRDR_FUNC_RAW_COST, (CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS' THEN (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate (pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.acct_currency_code,pa_projects_all.projfunc_currency_code,xal.accounting_date),0) AS PRDR_PROJFUNC_RAW_COST, (CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS' THEN (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate (pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.acct_currency_code,pa_projects_all.project_currency_code,xal.accounting_date),0) AS PRDR_PROJ_RAW_COST, 0 AS PRDR_FUNC_BURDENED_COST, 0 AS PRDR_PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST, 0 AS PRDR_PROJ_BURDENED_COST, (CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS' THEN PA_COST_DISTRIBUTION_LINES_ALL.ACCT_CURRENCY_CODE ELSE NULL END) AS PRDR_ACCT_CURR_CODE, NULL AS non_billable_code1 -- Classfication code P ,NULL AS non_billable_code2 -- Classfication code R ,NULL AS non_billable_code3 -- Classfication code W ,NULL AS non_billable_code4 -- Classfication code C ,NULL AS non_billable_code5 -- Classfication code X ,0 AS NB1_Hours -- Classfication Hours P ,0 AS NB2_Hours -- Classfication Hours R ,0 AS NB3_Hours -- Classfication Hours W ,0 AS NB4_Hours -- Classfication Hours C ,0 AS NB5_Hours -- Classfication Hours X ,CASE WHEN FND_USER.USER_NAME = 'CONVERSION' OR PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '%CONVERSION%' OR PEIA.EXPENDITURE_TYPE LIKE 'Conv-%' OR PEIA.BILL_GROUP LIKE 'CH2M-CONVERSION%' THEN 'CONVERSION' ELSE NULL END AS X_CONVERSION_NAME ,PAAF.ASS_ATTRIBUTE3 AS X_ASSIGNED_PU_ID ,peia.ORIG_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE AS X_ORIG_TRANS_REFERENCE ,CASE WHEN INSTR ( peia.attribute8, 'JMC LC') > 1 THEN NEXT_DAY (pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.pa_Date - 1, 'FRIDAY') END as X_CORRECTION_DATE ,case when xah.gl_transfer_status_code ='Y' THEN xah.gl_transfer_Date END AS X_GL_TRANSFER_DATE ,pa_expenditures_all.EXPENDITURE_ENDING_DATE as X_EXPENDITURE_END_DATE FROM pa_cost_distribution_lines_all , pa_expenditure_items_all peia, pa_expenditures_all , pa_implementations_all , gl_ledgers , apps.pa_lookups , pa_projects_all , PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL , PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES , -- PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS, PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES , BOM_RESOURCES , PO_LINES_ALL POL, PO_LINE_TYPES_B LT, -- gl_code_combinations cr_gl_code_combinations, gl_code_combinations dr_gl_code_combinations, --ap_invoice_distributions_all apid, --po_distributions_all pd, --po_headers_all poh, --ap_invoices_all api, per_all_people_f incurred_by, --per_all_people_f entered_by pa_tasks , xla_distribution_links xdl, xla_ae_headers xah, xla_ae_lines xal, FND_USER ,PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F PAAF WHERE
1=1 AND
peia.EXPENDITURE_TYPE = PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.EXPENDITURE_TYPE AND FND_USER.USER_ID(+) = peia.CREATED_BY AND pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.expenditure_item_id = peia.expenditure_item_id AND peia.expenditure_id = pa_expenditures_all.expenditure_id --AND (select decode(peia.transaction_source,'IC Elimination',c.cr_code_combination_id, c.dr_code_combination_id) from PA_COST_DISTRIBUTION_LINES_ALL c --where expenditure_item_id = peia.expenditure_item_id and line_type = DECODE(peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION,'VI','R', 'PJ','R', DECODE(peia.expenditure_type,'India Elimination','R',DECODE(INSTR(peia.expenditure_type,'ICWHREI'),1,'R','D'))) and reversed_flag is null and line_num_reversed is null) = dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id AND pa_projects_all.project_id = pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_id AND pa_lookups.lookup_code (+)= pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_type AND pa_lookups.lookup_type (+)= 'COST DISTRIBUTION LINE TYPE' AND pa_implementations_all.org_id = pa_projects_all.org_id AND PA_PROJECTS_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE = PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE AND PA_PROJECTS_ALL.ORG_ID = PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.ORG_ID --AND peia.assignment_id = PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.assignment_id (+) AND peia.non_labor_resource = PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.non_labor_resource (+) AND peia.wip_resource_id = BOM_RESOURCES.resource_id (+) AND peia.PO_LINE_ID = POL.PO_LINE_ID (+) -- PC: do these join by a different criteria? AND POL.LINE_TYPE_ID = LT.LINE_TYPE_ID (+) --AND TO_NUMBER(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.system_reference2) = apid.invoice_id(+) --AND TO_NUMBER(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.system_reference3) = apid.distribution_line_number(+) --AND APID.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID = PD.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID(+) --AND PD.PO_HEADER_ID = POH.PO_HEADER_ID(+) --AND APID.INVOICE_ID = API.INVOICE_ID(+) AND pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_type = 'R' -- Raw Cost AND pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_person_id = PAAF.person_id (+) AND trunc(pa_expenditures_all.creation_date) <= trunc(PAAF.effective_end_date (+)) AND trunc(pa_expenditures_all.creation_date) >= trunc(PAAF.effective_start_date (+)) --(CASE WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG' THEN 'R' WHEN (peia.system_linkage_function NOT IN ('VI','USG') and xah.event_type_code IN ('LABOR_COST_DIST','LABOR_COST_DIST_ADJ','xxUSG_COST_DIST')) THEN 'R' ELSE 'D' END) --AND peia.TRANSACTION_SOURCE <> 'IC Elimination' -- REMOVED from R12 AND pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_person_id = incurred_by.person_id (+) AND trunc(pa_expenditures_all.creation_date) <= trunc(incurred_by.effective_end_date (+)) AND trunc(pa_expenditures_all.creation_date) >= trunc(incurred_by.effective_start_date (+)) --AND pa_expenditures_all.entered_by_person_id = entered_by.person_id (+) AND peia.task_id = pa_tasks.task_id (+) AND pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.expenditure_item_id = xdl.source_distribution_id_num_1 AND pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_num = xdl.source_distribution_id_num_2 AND xal.ae_header_id = xah.ae_header_id -- changed from xdl to xal AND xah.gl_transfer_status_code = 'Y' AND xah.accounting_entry_status_code = 'F' AND xal.ae_header_id = xdl.ae_header_id -- changed reverse the join and xdl.application_id=XAL.application_id and XAL.application_id=XAH.application_id and XAH.application_id=275 AND xdl.ae_line_num = xal.ae_line_num AND xal.accounting_class_code IN ('COST','PROVIDER_COST','RECEIVER_COST') AND peia.system_linkage_function not in('VI','USG') AND xal.ledger_id = gl_ledgers.ledger_id AND gl_ledgers.PERIOD_SET_NAME = 'JEG_STD_CAL' --SS AND gl_ledgers.ledger_category_code = 'PRIMARY' --AND dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id = 57064 --AND dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id = xal.code_combination_id --- giving good result AND dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id = (SELECT NVL((xal2.code_combination_id),-1) FROM xla_distribution_links xdl2, xla_ae_lines xal2
WHERE xdl2.source_distribution_id_num_1 = pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.expenditure_item_id AND xdl2.ae_header_id = xal2.ae_header_id AND xdl2.ae_line_num = xal2.ae_line_num
AND xdl2.source_distribution_type = 'D' AND ROWNUM = 1) AND xal.currency_code <> 'STAT' AND XAL.ACCOUNTING_DATE >= to_date('10/01/2016', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AND (XAH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE >= to_date('$$MV_LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
)

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections

MAPPLET.DESCRIPTION: Extracts project cost distribution data from the source system and will do the necessary cleansing process
MAPPLET.NAME: JEG_mplt_BC_ORA_ProjectCostLine_NL

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
SELECT DISTINCT JEG_MV_COST_PA.EID, JEG_MV_COST_PA.line_num, JEG_MV_COST_PA.creation_date_dl, JEG_MV_COST_PA.created_by_dl, JEG_MV_COST_PA.transfer_status_code, (CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.line_type = 'I' THEN 0 ELSE JEG_MV_COST_PA.quantity END) quantity, JEG_MV_COST_PA.billable_flag, JEG_MV_COST_PA.program_update_date, JEG_MV_COST_PA.pa_date, dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id dr_code_combination_id, --nvl(JEG_MV_COST_PA.recvr_gl_date,JEG_MV_COST_PA.gl_date) recvr_gl_date,
( SELECT GREATEST(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xah, PCDL2.gl_Date) FROM pa_cost_distribution_lines_all@TO_RERPPRD_APPSREAD PCDL2 WHERE PCDL2.expenditure_item_id = JEG_MV_COST_PA.EID AND PCDL2.line_type = 'R' AND ROWNUM = 1 ) as gl_date, ( SELECT GREATEST(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xah, PCDL2.gl_Date) FROM pa_cost_distribution_lines_all@TO_RERPPRD_APPSREAD PCDL2 WHERE PCDL2.expenditure_item_id = JEG_MV_COST_PA.EID AND PCDL2.line_type = 'R' AND ROWNUM = 1 ) as recvr_gl_date,
JEG_MV_COST_PA.reversed_flag, JEG_MV_COST_PA.org_id, JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_id, JEG_MV_COST_PA.task_id, JEG_MV_COST_PA.denom_currency_code, (SIGN(NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.amount,1)) * ABS(JEG_MV_COST_PA.raw_cost)) as denom_raw_cost, (SIGN(NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.amount,1)) * ABS(JEG_MV_COST_PA.burden_cost)) AS DENOM_BURDENED_COST, JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_currency_code, JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_rate_date, JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_rate_type, JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_exchange_rate, JEG_MV_COST_PA.projfunc_cost_exchange_rate, JEG_MV_COST_PA.work_type_id,
jeg_get_gl_period@TO_RERPPRD_APPSREAD(( SELECT GREATEST(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xah, PCDL2.gl_Date) FROM pa_cost_distribution_lines_all@TO_RERPPRD_APPSREAD PCDL2 WHERE PCDL2.expenditure_item_id = JEG_MV_COST_PA.EID AND PCDL2.line_type = 'R' AND ROWNUM = 1 ),JEG_MV_COST_PA.org_id) as gl_period_name,
jeg_get_pa_period@TO_RERPPRD_APPSREAD(( SELECT GREATEST(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xah, PCDL2.gl_Date) FROM pa_cost_distribution_lines_all@TO_RERPPRD_APPSREAD PCDL2 WHERE PCDL2.expenditure_item_id = JEG_MV_COST_PA.EID AND PCDL2.line_type = 'R' AND ROWNUM = 1 ),JEG_MV_COST_PA.org_id) as pa_period_name,
--nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.period_name, JEG_MV_COST_PA.gl_period_name) as gl_period_name, --nvl(JEG_MV_COST_PA.recvr_pa_period_name,JEG_MV_COST_PA.pa_period_name) recvr_pa_period_name, JEG_MV_COST_PA.projfunc_cost_rate_type, JEG_MV_COST_PA.projfunc_cost_rate_date, JEG_MV_COST_PA.projfunc_currency_code, JEG_MV_COST_PA.expenditure_item_date, JEG_MV_COST_PA.expenditure_type, JEG_MV_COST_PA.expenditure_organization_id, JEG_MV_COST_PA.job_id, JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function, NULL AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, JEG_MV_COST_PA.NEW_UNIT_OF_MEASURE, INCURRED_BY_HR_ID as JEG_MV_COST_PA_HR_ID, JEG_MV_COST_PA.incurred_by_organization_id, 0 as entered_by, JEG_MV_COST_PA.vendor_id, JEG_MV_COST_PA.period_set_name, JEG_MV_COST_XLA.period_set_name, NULL AS PROJECT_ROLE_ID, null resource_organization_id, JEG_MV_COST_PA.non_labor_resource, (CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function IN ('ER','PJ','BTC') THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function IN ('OT','ST') THEN 'PEOPLE' WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function = 'INV' THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS' WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS' WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE,'NA') <> 'RATE' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE = 'RATE' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG='Y' THEN 'PEOPLE' WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE = 'RATE' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG = 'N' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function = 'WIP' AND NVL(null,0) NOT IN (1,2) THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function = 'USG' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG = 'N' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function = 'USG' AND NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG,'Y') = 'Y' THEN 'EQUIPMENT' ELSE ' ' END) resource_class, JEG_MV_COST_PA.wip_resource_id, JEG_MV_COST_PA.line_type, JEG_MV_COST_PA.PROJFUNC_RAW_COST, JEG_MV_COST_PA.PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST, JEG_MV_COST_PA.PROJECT_RAW_COST, JEG_MV_COST_PA.PROJECT_BURDENED_COST, JEG_MV_COST_PA.raw_cost_rate, JEG_MV_COST_PA.burden_cost_rate, JEG_MV_COST_PA.bill_job_id, JEG_MV_COST_PA.transaction_source, JEG_MV_COST_PA.PROJECT_TYPE_CLASS_CODE, '0' AS X_CUSTOM, JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute8, 0 as denom_raw_cost, JEG_MV_COST_PA.cost_burden_distributed_flag, JEG_MV_COST_PA.bill_hold_flag, (SIGN(NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.amount,1)) * ABS(JEG_MV_COST_PA.burden_cost)) AS BURDEN_COST, JEG_MV_COST_PA.cost_dist_rejection_code, JEG_MV_COST_PA.cc_cross_charge_code, JEG_MV_COST_PA.cc_ic_processed_code, JEG_MV_COST_PA.bill_job_billing_title, JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute2, JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute5, JEG_MV_COST_PA.cc_cross_charge_type, JEG_MV_COST_PA.JEG_GET_CLASS_FUN, JEG_MV_PO.invoice_num, JEG_MV_PO.invoice_date, JEG_MV_PO.po_num, JEG_MV_COST_PA.non_labor_resource, TRIM(dr_gl_code_combinations.segment3) gl_code_segment3, JEG_MV_COST_PA.cc_prvdr_organization_id, JEG_MV_COST_PA.cc_recvr_organization_id, JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute3, JEG_MV_COST_XLA.func_currency_code, (SIGN(NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.amount,1)) * ABS(JEG_MV_COST_PA.acct_burdened_cost)) AS FUNC_BURDENED_COST, (SIGN(NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.amount,1)) * ABS(JEG_MV_COST_PA.acct_raw_cost)) AS FUNC_RAW_COST, JEG_MV_COST_PA.customer_id, JEG_MV_COST_XLA.ae_line_num, 'NON_LABOR_COST' as source_type, JEG_MV_COST_XLA.ae_header_id ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.USER_NAME = 'CONVERSION' OR JEG_MV_COST_PA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '%CONVERSION%' OR UPPER(JEG_MV_COST_PA.EXPENDITURE_TYPE) LIKE '%CONVERSION%' OR JEG_MV_COST_PA.BILL_GROUP LIKE 'CH2M-CONVERSION%' THEN 'CONVERSION' ELSE NULL END AS X_CONVERSION_NAME ,JEG_MV_COST_PA.X_ASSIGNED_PU_ID ,JEG_MV_COST_PA.X_ORIG_TRANS_REFERENCE ,JEG_MV_COST_PA.X_GL_TRANSFER_DATE ,JEG_MV_COST_PA.X_EXPENDITURE_END_DATE FROM
JEG_MV_COST_PA1 JEG_MV_COST_PA, JEG_MV_COST_XLA1 JEG_MV_COST_XLA, JEG_MV_PO JEG_MV_PO, gl_code_combinations@TO_RERPPRD_APPSREAD dr_gl_code_combinations WHERE
TO_NUMBER(JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_reference2) = JEG_MV_PO.invoice_id AND JEG_MV_COST_XLA.source_distribution_id_num_1 = JEG_MV_PO.invoice_distribution_id AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.document_distribution_id = JEG_MV_PO.invoice_distribution_id
AND JEG_MV_COST_XLA.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_TYPE = 'AP_INV_DIST' AND JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_line_code IN ( 'AP_FREIGHT_EXPENSE_CM','AP_FREIGHT_EXPENSE_INV','AP_ITEM_EXPENSE_CM','AP_ITEM_EXPENSE_DM','AP_ITEM_EXPENSE_INV','AP_MISC_EXPENSE_CM','AP_MISC_EXPENSE_INV','AP_NON_RECOV_TAX_CM','AP_NON_RECOV_TAX_DM','AP_NON_RECOV_TAX_INV','JEG_US_AP_CM_IC_FRINGE_CR','JEG_US_AP_CM_IC_FRINGE_DR', 'JEG_US_AP_INTERCO_CM_COST_ELIM','JEG_US_AP_INTERCO_CM_REV_ELIM','JEG_US_AP_INTERCO_COST_ELIM','JEG_US_AP_INTERCO_REV_ELIM','JEG_US_AP_INV_IC_FRINGE_CR','JEG_US_AP_INV_IC_FRINGE_DR')
AND dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id = nvl( -- First try to get the First R Line from PA JEG_MV_COST_PA.PA_CODE_COMBINATION_ID, -- If R line is not available use the AP line from the Invoice nvl(JEG_MV_PO.AP_CODE_COMBINATION_ID -- If all else fails to back to CDL ,JEG_MV_COST_PA.PCDLA_code_combination_id) ) AND JEG_MV_COST_XLA.APPLICATION_ID = 200

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Source Filter
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: PA_EXPENDITURE_ITEMS_ALL.EXPENDITURE_TYPE = PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.EXPENDITURE_TYPE AND pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.expenditure_item_id = pa_expenditure_items_all.expenditure_item_id AND pa_expenditure_items_all.expenditure_id = pa_expenditures_all.expenditure_id AND pa_projects_all.project_id = pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_id AND pa_lookups.lookup_code = pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_type AND pa_lookups.lookup_type = 'COST DISTRIBUTION LINE TYPE' AND pa_implementations_all.org_id = pa_projects_all.org_id AND gl_sets_of_books.set_of_books_id = pa_implementations_all.set_of_books_id AND PA_PROJECTS_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE = PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE AND PA_PROJECTS_ALL.ORG_ID = PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.ORG_ID AND PA_EXPENDITURE_ITEMS_ALL.assignment_id = PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.assignment_id (+) AND PA_EXPENDITURE_ITEMS_ALL.non_labor_resource = PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.non_labor_resource (+) AND PA_EXPENDITURE_ITEMS_ALL.wip_resource_id = BOM_RESOURCES.resource_id (+) AND PA_EXPENDITURE_ITEMS_ALL.PO_LINE_ID = POL.PO_LINE_ID (+) AND POL.LINE_TYPE_ID = LT.LINE_TYPE_ID (+)
