ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
SELECT DISTINCT JEG_MV_COST_PA.EID, JEG_MV_COST_PA.line_num, JEG_MV_COST_PA.creation_date_dl, JEG_MV_COST_PA.created_by_dl, JEG_MV_COST_PA.transfer_status_code, (CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.line_type = 'I' THEN 0 ELSE JEG_MV_COST_PA.quantity END) quantity, JEG_MV_COST_PA.billable_flag, JEG_MV_COST_PA.program_update_date, JEG_MV_COST_PA.pa_date, dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id dr_code_combination_id, --nvl(JEG_MV_COST_PA.recvr_gl_date,JEG_MV_COST_PA.gl_date) recvr_gl_date,
( SELECT GREATEST(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xah, PCDL2.gl_Date) FROM pa_cost_distribution_lines_all PCDL2 WHERE PCDL2.expenditure_item_id = JEG_MV_COST_PA.EID AND PCDL2.line_type = 'R' AND ROWNUM = 1 ) as gl_date, ( SELECT GREATEST(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xah, PCDL2.gl_Date) FROM pa_cost_distribution_lines_all PCDL2 WHERE PCDL2.expenditure_item_id = JEG_MV_COST_PA.EID AND PCDL2.line_type = 'R' AND ROWNUM = 1 ) as recvr_gl_date,
JEG_MV_COST_PA.reversed_flag, JEG_MV_COST_PA.org_id, JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_id, JEG_MV_COST_PA.task_id, JEG_MV_COST_PA.denom_currency_code, (SIGN(NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.amount,1)) * ABS(JEG_MV_COST_PA.raw_cost)) as denom_raw_cost, (SIGN(NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.amount,1)) * ABS(JEG_MV_COST_PA.burden_cost)) AS DENOM_BURDENED_COST, JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_currency_code, JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_rate_date, JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_rate_type, JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_exchange_rate, JEG_MV_COST_PA.projfunc_cost_exchange_rate, JEG_MV_COST_PA.work_type_id,
jeg_get_gl_period(( SELECT GREATEST(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xah, PCDL2.gl_Date) FROM pa_cost_distribution_lines_all PCDL2 WHERE PCDL2.expenditure_item_id = JEG_MV_COST_PA.EID AND PCDL2.line_type = 'R' AND ROWNUM = 1 ),JEG_MV_COST_PA.org_id) as gl_period_name,
jeg_get_pa_period(( SELECT GREATEST(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xah, PCDL2.gl_Date) FROM pa_cost_distribution_lines_all PCDL2 WHERE PCDL2.expenditure_item_id = JEG_MV_COST_PA.EID AND PCDL2.line_type = 'R' AND ROWNUM = 1 ),JEG_MV_COST_PA.org_id) as pa_period_name,
--nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.period_name, JEG_MV_COST_PA.gl_period_name) as gl_period_name, --nvl(JEG_MV_COST_PA.recvr_pa_period_name,JEG_MV_COST_PA.pa_period_name) recvr_pa_period_name, JEG_MV_COST_PA.projfunc_cost_rate_type, JEG_MV_COST_PA.projfunc_cost_rate_date, JEG_MV_COST_PA.projfunc_currency_code, JEG_MV_COST_PA.expenditure_item_date, JEG_MV_COST_PA.expenditure_type, JEG_MV_COST_PA.expenditure_organization_id, JEG_MV_COST_PA.job_id, JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function, NULL AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, JEG_MV_COST_PA.NEW_UNIT_OF_MEASURE, INCURRED_BY_HR_ID as JEG_MV_COST_PA_HR_ID, JEG_MV_COST_PA.incurred_by_organization_id, 0 as entered_by, JEG_MV_COST_PA.vendor_id, JEG_MV_COST_PA.period_set_name, JEG_MV_COST_XLA.period_set_name, NULL AS PROJECT_ROLE_ID, null resource_organization_id, JEG_MV_COST_PA.non_labor_resource, (CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function IN ('ER','PJ','BTC') THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function IN ('OT','ST') THEN 'PEOPLE' WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function = 'INV' THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS' WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS' WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE,'NA') <> 'RATE' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE = 'RATE' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG='Y' THEN 'PEOPLE' WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE = 'RATE' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG = 'N' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function = 'WIP' AND NVL(null,0) NOT IN (1,2) THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function = 'USG' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG = 'N' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function = 'USG' AND NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG,'Y') = 'Y' THEN 'EQUIPMENT' ELSE ' ' END) resource_class, JEG_MV_COST_PA.wip_resource_id, JEG_MV_COST_PA.line_type, JEG_MV_COST_PA.PROJFUNC_RAW_COST, JEG_MV_COST_PA.PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST, JEG_MV_COST_PA.PROJECT_RAW_COST, JEG_MV_COST_PA.PROJECT_BURDENED_COST, JEG_MV_COST_PA.raw_cost_rate, JEG_MV_COST_PA.burden_cost_rate, JEG_MV_COST_PA.bill_job_id, JEG_MV_COST_PA.transaction_source, JEG_MV_COST_PA.PROJECT_TYPE_CLASS_CODE, '0' AS X_CUSTOM, JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute8, 0 as denom_raw_cost, JEG_MV_COST_PA.cost_burden_distributed_flag, JEG_MV_COST_PA.bill_hold_flag, (SIGN(NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.amount,1)) * ABS(JEG_MV_COST_PA.burden_cost)) AS BURDEN_COST, JEG_MV_COST_PA.cost_dist_rejection_code, JEG_MV_COST_PA.cc_cross_charge_code, JEG_MV_COST_PA.cc_ic_processed_code, JEG_MV_COST_PA.bill_job_billing_title, JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute2, JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute5, JEG_MV_COST_PA.cc_cross_charge_type, JEG_MV_COST_PA.JEG_GET_CLASS_FUN, JEG_MV_PO.invoice_num, JEG_MV_PO.invoice_date, JEG_MV_PO.po_num, JEG_MV_COST_PA.non_labor_resource, TRIM(dr_gl_code_combinations.segment3) gl_code_segment3, JEG_MV_COST_PA.cc_prvdr_organization_id, JEG_MV_COST_PA.cc_recvr_organization_id, JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute3, JEG_MV_COST_XLA.func_currency_code, (SIGN(NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.amount,1)) * ABS(JEG_MV_COST_PA.acct_burdened_cost)) AS FUNC_BURDENED_COST, (SIGN(NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.amount,1)) * ABS(JEG_MV_COST_PA.acct_raw_cost)) AS FUNC_RAW_COST, JEG_MV_COST_PA.customer_id, JEG_MV_COST_XLA.ae_line_num, 'NON_LABOR_COST' as source_type, JEG_MV_COST_XLA.ae_header_id ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.USER_NAME = 'CONVERSION' OR JEG_MV_COST_PA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '%CONVERSION%' OR UPPER(JEG_MV_COST_PA.EXPENDITURE_TYPE) LIKE '%CONVERSION%' OR JEG_MV_COST_PA.BILL_GROUP LIKE 'CH2M-CONVERSION%' THEN 'CONVERSION' ELSE NULL END AS X_CONVERSION_NAME ,JEG_MV_COST_PA.X_ASSIGNED_PU_ID ,JEG_MV_COST_PA.X_ORIG_TRANS_REFERENCE ,JEG_MV_COST_PA.X_GL_TRANSFER_DATE ,JEG_MV_COST_PA.X_EXPENDITURE_END_DATE FROM
JEG_MV_COST_PA1 JEG_MV_COST_PA, JEG_MV_COST_XLA1 JEG_MV_COST_XLA, JEG_MV_PO JEG_MV_PO, gl_code_combinations dr_gl_code_combinations WHERE
TO_NUMBER(JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_reference2) = JEG_MV_PO.invoice_id AND JEG_MV_COST_XLA.source_distribution_id_num_1 = JEG_MV_PO.invoice_distribution_id AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.document_distribution_id = JEG_MV_PO.invoice_distribution_id
AND JEG_MV_COST_XLA.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_TYPE = 'AP_INV_DIST' AND JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_line_code IN ( 'AP_FREIGHT_EXPENSE_CM','AP_FREIGHT_EXPENSE_INV','AP_ITEM_EXPENSE_CM','AP_ITEM_EXPENSE_DM','AP_ITEM_EXPENSE_INV','AP_MISC_EXPENSE_CM','AP_MISC_EXPENSE_INV','AP_NON_RECOV_TAX_CM','AP_NON_RECOV_TAX_DM','AP_NON_RECOV_TAX_INV','JEG_US_AP_CM_IC_FRINGE_CR','JEG_US_AP_CM_IC_FRINGE_DR', 'JEG_US_AP_INTERCO_CM_COST_ELIM','JEG_US_AP_INTERCO_CM_REV_ELIM','JEG_US_AP_INTERCO_COST_ELIM','JEG_US_AP_INTERCO_REV_ELIM','JEG_US_AP_INV_IC_FRINGE_CR','JEG_US_AP_INV_IC_FRINGE_DR')
AND dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id = nvl( -- First try to get the First R Line from PA JEG_MV_COST_PA.PA_CODE_COMBINATION_ID, -- If R line is not available use the AP line from the Invoice nvl(JEG_MV_PO.AP_CODE_COMBINATION_ID -- If all else fails to back to CDL ,JEG_MV_COST_PA.PCDLA_code_combination_id) ) AND JEG_MV_COST_XLA.APPLICATION_ID = 200

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections

MAPPLET.DESCRIPTION: Extracts project cost distribution data from the source system and will do the necessary cleansing process
MAPPLET.NAME: JEG_mplt_BC_ORA_ProjectCostLine_IC

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
----------------------------------- -- COST INTERCOMPANY ----------------------------------- SELECT $$HINT1 0 as expenditure_item_id, xal.ae_line_num as line_num, xal.creation_date as creation_date, xal.created_by as created_by, 'N/A' as transfer_status_code, 0 as quantity, 'N' as billable_flag, ppa.program_update_date as program_update_date, xal.accounting_date as pa_date, GCC_1.CODE_COMBINATION_ID AS COST_CODE_COMBINATION_ID, xal.accounting_date as gl_date, xal.accounting_date as recvr_gl_date, 'N' as reversed_flag, ppa.org_id as org_id, ppa.project_id, null as task_id, xal.currency_code as denom_currency_code, (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) as denom_raw_cost, (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) as denom_burdened_cost, ppa.project_currency_code as project_currency_code, ppa.project_rate_date as project_rev_rate_date, ppa.project_rate_type as project_rev_rate_type, NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate ( GL_LEDGERS.currency_code ,PPA.project_currency_code ,XAL.accounting_date ),1) as project_exchange_rate, NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate ( GL_LEDGERS.currency_code ,PPA.projfunc_currency_code ,XAL.accounting_date ),1) as projfunc_exchange_rate, null as work_type_id, jeg_get_gl_period(xal.accounting_date,ppa.org_id) as recvr_gl_period_name, jeg_get_pa_period(xal.accounting_date,ppa.org_id) as recvr_pa_period_name, ppa.projfunc_bil_rate_type as projfunc_cost_rate_type, xal.accounting_date as projfunc_cost_rate_date, ppa.projfunc_currency_code as projfunc_currency_code, null as expenditure_item_date, (SELECT aid.expenditure_type||DECODE(PPA.segment1,'44IWSNBL','++'||AID.task_id) FROM xla_distribution_links XDL, ap_invoice_distributions_all AID WHERE xdl.ae_headeR_id = xal.ae_header_id AND xdl.ae_line_num = xal.ae_line_num AND XDL.source_distribution_type = 'AP_INV_DIST' AND XDL.source_distribution_id_num_1 = AID.invoice_distribution_id AND XDL.accounting_line_code in ('JEG_US_FRINGE_SPLIT_IC_AP_DR','JEG_US_FRINGE_SPLIT_IC_AP_CR', 'AP_ITEM_EXPENSE_INV') AND ROWNUM = 1) as expenditure_type, null as expenditure_org_id, null as job_id, 'COST_INTERCOMPANY' as system_linkage_function, null as inventory_item_id, 'N/A' as unit_of_measure, '0' as incurred_by_person_id, 0 as incurred_by_org_id, 0 as entered_by_person_id, 0 as vendor_id, gl_ledgers.period_set_name as pa_period_set_name, gl_ledgers.period_set_name gl_period_set_name, null as project_role_id, null as resource_org_id, null as non_labor_resource, null as resource_class, 0 AS WIP_RESOURCE_ID, 'COST_INTERCOMPANY' as line_type, (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate ( GL_LEDGERS.currency_code ,PPA.projfunc_currency_code ,XAL.accounting_date ),1) AS PROJFUNC_RAW_COST, (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate ( GL_LEDGERS.currency_code ,PPA.projfunc_currency_code ,XAL.accounting_date ),1) AS PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST, (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate ( GL_LEDGERS.currency_code ,PPA.project_currency_code ,XAL.accounting_date ),1) AS PROJECT_RAW_COST, (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate ( GL_LEDGERS.currency_code ,PPA.project_currency_code ,XAL.accounting_date ),1) AS PROJECT_BURDENED_COST, null as raw_cost_rate, null as burden_cost_rate, 0 as bill_job_id, 'ELIMINATION_COST' as transaction_source, pa_project_types_all.project_type_class_code, '0' as x_custom, null as attribute8, (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) as denom_raw_cost, 'N' as cost_burden_distributed_flag, 'N' as bill_hold_flag, 0 as burden_cost, null as cost_dist_rejection_code, null as cc_cross_charge_code, null as cc_ic_processed_code, 'N/A' as bill_job_billing_title, 'N/A' as attribute2, 'N/A' as attribute5, 'N/A' as cross_charge_type, jeg_get_class(ppa.project_id, 'Controlling Performance Unit','C') as control_pu, null as invoice_num, null as invoice_date, null as po_num, null as non_labor_resource, trim(GCC_1.segment3) as charged_pu, null as cc_prvdr_org_id, null as cc_recvr_org_id, null as job_id, gl_ledgers.currency_code as func_curr_code, (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) as func_burdened_cost, (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) as func_raw_cost, 0 as task_customer_id, xal.ae_line_num, 'COST_INTERCOMPANY' as source_type, xal.ae_header_id, NULL AS X_USER_NAME ,NULL AS X_ASSIGNED_PU_ID
,case when xah.gl_transfer_status_code ='Y' THEN xah.gl_transfer_Date END AS X_GL_TRANSFER_DATE FROM gl_ledgers, pa_projects_all ppa, pa_project_types_all, xla_ae_lines xal, xla_ae_headers xah, GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS GCC_1
WHERE XAH.AE_HEADER_ID = XAL.AE_HEADER_ID AND (GL_LEDGERS.LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE = 'PRIMARY') AND XAH.GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE = 'Y' AND XAH.ACCOUNTING_ENTRY_sTATUS_CODE = 'F' AND XAL.LEDGER_ID = GL_LEDGERS.LEDGER_ID AND XAL.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = GCC_1.CODE_COMBINATION_ID AND PPA.ORG_ID = PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.ORG_ID AND ppa.project_type = pa_project_types_all.project_type AND GL_LEDGERS.PERIOD_SET_NAME = 'JEG_STD_CAL' AND XAL.ACCOUNTING_DATE >= to_date('10/01/2016', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM xla_distribution_links XDL, ap_invoice_distributions_all AID, ap_invoice_lines_all AIL, ra_customer_trx_all RCT, pa_draft_invoices_all PDI, hr_all_organization_units ROU WHERE XDL.AE_HEADER_ID = XAH.AE_HEADER_ID AND XAL.AE_LINE_NUM = XDL.AE_LINE_NUM AND XDL.source_distribution_type = 'AP_INV_DIST' AND AID.invoice_id = AIL.invoice_id AND AID.invoice_line_number = AIL.line_number AND RCT.customer_trx_id = AIL.pa_cc_ar_invoice_id AND RCT.trx_number = PDI.ra_invoice_number AND RCT.org_id = PDI.org_id AND PPA.PROJECT_ID = AID.PROJECT_ID AND XDL.source_distribution_type = 'AP_INV_DIST' AND XDL.source_distribution_id_num_1 = AID.invoice_distribution_id AND XDL.accounting_line_code in ('JEG_US_FRINGE_SPLIT_IC_AP_DR','JEG_US_FRINGE_SPLIT_IC_AP_CR', 'AP_ITEM_EXPENSE_CM', 'AP_ITEM_EXPENSE_INV') AND ROU.organization_id = RCT.org_id ) AND (PPA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE >= to_date('$$MV_LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') OR XAH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE >= to_date('$$MV_LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')) --AND PPA.SEGMENT1 NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT PROJECT_NUMBER FROM ($$X_DIVESTCO_SQL)) --Added for Divestiture logic for ECR AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ($$X_DIVESTCO_SQL) SQ WHERE SQ.PROJECT_NUMBER = PPA.SEGMENT1 )--Added for Divestiture logic.

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT EXPENDITURE_ITEM_ID, LINE_NUM , CREATION_DATE, CREATED_BY , TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE, QUANTITY , BILLABLE_FLAG , PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, PA_DATE , COST_CODE_COMBINATION_ID , GL_DATE, RECVR_GL_DATE, REVERSED_FLAG , ORG_ID , PROJECT_ID , TASK_ID , DENOM_CURRENCY_CODE , DENOM_RAW_COST , DENOM_BURDENED_COST , PROJECT_CURRENCY_CODE , PROJECT_REV_RATE_date , PROJECT_REV_RATE_TYPE , PROJECT_EXCHANGE_RATE , PROJFUNC_EXCHANGE_RATE , WORK_TYPE_ID , RECVR_GL_PERIOD_NAME , RECVR_PA_PERIOD_NAME , PROJFUNC_COST_RATE_TYPE , PROJFUNC_COST_RATE_date , PROJFUNC_CURRENCY_CODE , EXPENDITURE_ITEM_date , EXPENDITURE_TYPE , EXPENDITURE_ORG_ID , null as job_id , SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION , INVENTORY_ITEM_ID , UNIT_OF_MEASURE , INCURRED_BY_PERSON_ID , INCURRED_BY_ORG_ID , ENTERED_BY_PERSON_ID, VENDOR_ID , PA_PERIOD_SET_NAME , GL_PERIOD_SET_NAME , PROJECT_ROLE_ID , RESOURCE_ORG_ID , NON_LABOR_RESOURCE , RESOURCE_CLASS , WIP_RESOURCE_ID , LINE_TYPE , PROJFUNC_RAW_COST , PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST , PROJECT_RAW_COST , PROJECT_BURDENED_COST , RAW_COST_RATE , BURDEN_COST_RATE , BILL_JOB_ID , TRANSACTION_SOURCE , PROJECT_TYPE_CLASS_CODE , X_CUSTOM , ATTRIBUTE8 , denom_raw_cost , COST_BURDEN_DISTRIBUTED_FLAG , BILL_HOLD_FLAG , BURDEN_COST , COST_DIST_REJECTION_CODE , CC_CROSS_CHARGE_CODE , CC_IC_PROCESSED_CODE , BILL_JOB_BILLING_TITLE , ATTRIBUTE2 , ATTRIBUTE5 , CROSS_CHARGE_TYPE , CONTROL_PU , INVOICE_NUM , INVOICE_DATE , PO_NUM , null as non_labor_resource , CHARGED_PU , CC_PRVDR_ORG_ID , CC_RECVR_ORG_ID , JOB_ID , FUNC_CURR_CODE , FUNC_BURDENED_COST , FUNC_RAW_COST , TASK_CUSTOMER_ID , AE_LINE_NUM , SOURCE_TYPE , AE_HEADER_ID , USER_NAME , X_ASSIGNED_PU_ID , X_ORIG_TRANS_REFERENCE , X_GL_TRANSFER_DATE , NULL AS X_EXPENDITURE_END_DATE FROM JEG_MV_GID_COST_ELIM

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
----------------------------------- -- COST INTERCOMPANY ----------------------------------- SELECT $$HINT1 0 as expenditure_item_id, xal.ae_line_num as line_num, xal.creation_date as creation_date, xal.created_by as created_by, 'N/A' as transfer_status_code, 0 as quantity, 'N' as billable_flag, ppa.program_update_date as program_update_date, xal.accounting_date as pa_date, GCC_1.CODE_COMBINATION_ID AS COST_CODE_COMBINATION_ID, xal.accounting_date as gl_date, xal.accounting_date as recvr_gl_date, 'N' as reversed_flag, ppa.org_id as org_id, ppa.project_id, null as task_id, xal.currency_code as denom_currency_code, (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) as denom_raw_cost, (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) as denom_burdened_cost, ppa.project_currency_code as project_currency_code, ppa.project_rate_date as project_rev_rate_date, ppa.project_rate_type as project_rev_rate_type, NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate ( GL_LEDGERS.currency_code ,PPA.project_currency_code ,XAL.accounting_date ),1) as project_exchange_rate, NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate ( GL_LEDGERS.currency_code ,PPA.projfunc_currency_code ,XAL.accounting_date ),1) as projfunc_exchange_rate, null as work_type_id, jeg_get_gl_period(xal.accounting_date,ppa.org_id) as recvr_gl_period_name, jeg_get_pa_period(xal.accounting_date,ppa.org_id) as recvr_pa_period_name, ppa.projfunc_bil_rate_type as projfunc_cost_rate_type, xal.accounting_date as projfunc_cost_rate_date, ppa.projfunc_currency_code as projfunc_currency_code, null as expenditure_item_date, (SELECT aid.expenditure_type||DECODE(PPA.segment1,'44IWSNBL','++'||AID.task_id) FROM xla_distribution_links XDL, ap_invoice_distributions_all AID WHERE xdl.ae_headeR_id = xal.ae_header_id AND xdl.ae_line_num = xal.ae_line_num AND XDL.source_distribution_type = 'AP_INV_DIST' AND XDL.source_distribution_id_num_1 = AID.invoice_distribution_id AND XDL.accounting_line_code in ('JEG_US_FRINGE_SPLIT_IC_AP_DR','JEG_US_FRINGE_SPLIT_IC_AP_CR', 'AP_ITEM_EXPENSE_INV') AND ROWNUM = 1) as expenditure_type, null as expenditure_org_id, null as job_id, 'COST_INTERCOMPANY' as system_linkage_function, null as inventory_item_id, 'N/A' as unit_of_measure, '0' as incurred_by_person_id, 0 as incurred_by_org_id, 0 as entered_by_person_id, 0 as vendor_id, gl_ledgers.period_set_name as pa_period_set_name, gl_ledgers.period_set_name gl_period_set_name, null as project_role_id, null as resource_org_id, null as non_labor_resource, null as resource_class, 0 AS WIP_RESOURCE_ID, 'COST_INTERCOMPANY' as line_type, (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate ( GL_LEDGERS.currency_code ,PPA.projfunc_currency_code ,XAL.accounting_date ),1) AS PROJFUNC_RAW_COST, (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate ( GL_LEDGERS.currency_code ,PPA.projfunc_currency_code ,XAL.accounting_date ),1) AS PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST, (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate ( GL_LEDGERS.currency_code ,PPA.project_currency_code ,XAL.accounting_date ),1) AS PROJECT_RAW_COST, (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate ( GL_LEDGERS.currency_code ,PPA.project_currency_code ,XAL.accounting_date ),1) AS PROJECT_BURDENED_COST, null as raw_cost_rate, null as burden_cost_rate, 0 as bill_job_id, 'ELIMINATION_COST' as transaction_source, pa_project_types_all.project_type_class_code, '0' as x_custom, null as attribute8, (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) as denom_raw_cost, 'N' as cost_burden_distributed_flag, 'N' as bill_hold_flag, 0 as burden_cost, null as cost_dist_rejection_code, null as cc_cross_charge_code, null as cc_ic_processed_code, 'N/A' as bill_job_billing_title, 'N/A' as attribute2, 'N/A' as attribute5, 'N/A' as cross_charge_type, jeg_get_class(ppa.project_id, 'Controlling Performance Unit','C') as control_pu, null as invoice_num, null as invoice_date, null as po_num, null as non_labor_resource, trim(GCC_1.segment3) as charged_pu, null as cc_prvdr_org_id, null as cc_recvr_org_id, null as job_id, gl_ledgers.currency_code as func_curr_code, (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) as func_burdened_cost, (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) as func_raw_cost, 0 as task_customer_id, xal.ae_line_num, 'COST_INTERCOMPANY' as source_type, xal.ae_header_id, NULL AS X_USER_NAME ,NULL AS X_ASSIGNED_PU_ID
,case when xah.gl_transfer_status_code ='Y' THEN xah.gl_transfer_Date END AS X_GL_TRANSFER_DATE FROM gl_ledgers, pa_projects_all ppa, pa_project_types_all, xla_ae_lines xal, xla_ae_headers xah, GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS GCC_1
WHERE XAH.AE_HEADER_ID = XAL.AE_HEADER_ID AND (GL_LEDGERS.LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE = 'PRIMARY') AND XAH.GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE = 'Y' AND XAH.ACCOUNTING_ENTRY_sTATUS_CODE = 'F' AND XAL.LEDGER_ID = GL_LEDGERS.LEDGER_ID AND XAL.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = GCC_1.CODE_COMBINATION_ID AND PPA.ORG_ID = PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.ORG_ID AND ppa.project_type = pa_project_types_all.project_type AND GL_LEDGERS.PERIOD_SET_NAME = 'JEG_STD_CAL' AND XAL.ACCOUNTING_DATE >= to_date('10/01/2016', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM xla_distribution_links XDL, ap_invoice_distributions_all AID, ap_invoice_lines_all AIL, ra_customer_trx_all RCT, pa_draft_invoices_all PDI, hr_all_organization_units ROU WHERE XDL.AE_HEADER_ID = XAH.AE_HEADER_ID AND XAL.AE_LINE_NUM = XDL.AE_LINE_NUM AND XDL.source_distribution_type = 'AP_INV_DIST' AND AID.invoice_id = AIL.invoice_id AND AID.invoice_line_number = AIL.line_number AND RCT.customer_trx_id = AIL.pa_cc_ar_invoice_id AND RCT.trx_number = PDI.ra_invoice_number AND RCT.org_id = PDI.org_id AND PPA.PROJECT_ID = AID.PROJECT_ID AND XDL.source_distribution_type = 'AP_INV_DIST' AND XDL.source_distribution_id_num_1 = AID.invoice_distribution_id AND XDL.accounting_line_code in ('JEG_US_FRINGE_SPLIT_IC_AP_DR','JEG_US_FRINGE_SPLIT_IC_AP_CR', 'AP_ITEM_EXPENSE_CM', 'AP_ITEM_EXPENSE_INV') AND ROU.organization_id = RCT.org_id ) AND (PPA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE >= to_date('$$MV_LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') OR XAH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE >= to_date('$$MV_LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')) --AND PPA.SEGMENT1 NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT PROJECT_NUMBER FROM ($$X_DIVESTCO_SQL)) --Added for Divestiture logic for ECR AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ($$X_DIVESTCO_SQL) SQ WHERE SQ.PROJECT_NUMBER = PPA.SEGMENT1 )--Added for Divestiture logic.

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Session Log File

ATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT peia.expenditure_item_id,--USG pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_num, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.creation_date, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.created_by, DECODE(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.transfer_status_code,'B','G', pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.transfer_status_code) transfer_status_code, 0 AS quantity, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.billable_flag, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.program_update_date, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.pa_date, dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id dr_code_combination_id, xal.accounting_date AS gl_date, xal.accounting_date AS recvr_gl_date, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.reversed_flag, pa_projects_all.ORG_ID prj_org_id, --USG pa_projects_all.PROJECT_ID, --USG pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.task_id,--USG pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.denom_currency_code, ( CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.denom_raw_cost ELSE ( CASE WHEN NVL(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(NVL(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) END) AS denom_raw_cost, 0 AS DENOM_BURDENED_COST, pa_projects_all.project_currency_code,--USG pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_rate_date, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_rate_type, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_exchange_rate, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_cost_exchange_rate, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.work_type_id, --xah.period_name, jeg_get_gl_period(NVL(xal.accounting_date,xah.accounting_date),pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.org_id) recvr_gl_period_name, --nvl(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.recvr_pa_period_name,pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.pa_period_name) recvr_pa_period_name, jeg_get_pa_period(NVL(xal.accounting_date,xah.accounting_date),pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.org_id) recvr_pa_period_name, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_cost_rate_type, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_cost_rate_date, pa_projects_all.projfunc_currency_code,--USG peia.expenditure_item_date, peia.EXPENDITURE_TYPE ||jeg_get_iws_rec_project(pa_projects_all.segment1,'L',peia.task_id) expenditure_type,--USG NVL(peia.override_to_organization_id, pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_organization_id) expenditure_organization_id, peia.job_id, peia.system_linkage_function, NULL AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, ( CASE WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'ST' THEN 'HOURS' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG' THEN 'USAGE HOURS' WHEN PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.UNIT_OF_MEASURE = 'MILEAGE' THEN 'MILEAGE' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'VI' THEN 'DOLLARS' ELSE PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.UNIT_OF_MEASURE END) NEW_UNIT_OF_MEASURE, NVL(incurred_by.attribute9,0) AS INCURRED_BY_HR_ID, pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_organization_id, 0 AS entered_by, pa_expenditures_all.vendor_id, pa_implementations_all.period_set_name, gl_ledgers.period_set_name, NULL AS PROJECT_ROLE_ID, NULL resource_organization_id, peia.non_labor_resource, ( CASE WHEN peia.system_linkage_function IN ('ER','PJ','BTC') THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function IN ('OT','ST') THEN 'PEOPLE' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'INV' THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS' WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS' WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND NVL(LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE,'NA') <> 'RATE' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE = 'RATE' AND PA_IMPLEMENTATIONS_ALL.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG='Y' THEN 'PEOPLE' WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE = 'RATE' AND PA_IMPLEMENTATIONS_ALL.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG = 'N' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'WIP' AND BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE = 2 THEN 'PEOPLE' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'WIP' AND BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE = 1 THEN 'EQUIPMENT' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'WIP' AND NVL(BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE,0) NOT IN (1,2) THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG' AND PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG = 'N' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG' AND NVL(PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG,'Y') = 'Y' THEN 'EQUIPMENT' ELSE ' ' END) resource_class, peia.wip_resource_id, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_type, DECODE ( peia.system_linkage_function ,'USG' ,ABS(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.amount) * SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) ) AS PROJFUNC_RAW_COST, --USG pf_Rawcost SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.amount) AS PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST,--USG pf_burden DECODE ( peia.system_linkage_function ,'USG' ,ABS(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_raw_cost) * SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) ) AS PROJECT_RAW_COST, --USG p_rawcost SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(NVL ( pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_burdened_cost ,peia.project_burdened_cost )) AS PROJECT_BURDENED_COST, --USG p_burden peia.raw_cost_rate, peia.burden_cost_rate, peia.bill_job_id, peia.transaction_source, PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE_CLASS_CODE, '0' AS X_CUSTOM, peia.attribute8, ( CASE WHEN NVL(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(NVL(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) AS denom_raw_cost, peia.cost_burden_distributed_flag, peia.bill_hold_flag, 0 AS BURDEN_COST, peia.cost_dist_rejection_code, peia.cc_cross_charge_code, peia.cc_ic_processed_code, peia.bill_job_billing_title, peia.attribute2, peia.attribute5, peia.cc_cross_charge_type, JEG_GET_CLASS(pa_projects_all.PROJECT_ID, 'Controlling Performance Unit','C'), NULL AS INVOICE_NUM, NULL AS INVOICE_DATE, NULL AS po_num, peia.non_labor_resource, TRIM(dr_gl_code_combinations.segment3), peia.cc_prvdr_organization_id, peia.cc_recvr_organization_id, TRIM(peia.attribute3), gl_ledgers.currency_code AS func_currency_code,--USG (NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) AS FUNC_BURDENED_COST,--USG f_burden DECODE ( peia.system_linkage_function ,'USG' ,NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0) ) AS FUNC_RAW_COST, --USG f_Rawcost pa_tasks.customer_id, xal.ae_line_num, 'LABOR_COST' AS source_type, xal.ae_header_id, ( CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS WORKSHARE_FLAG, ( CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN ( CASE WHEN NVL(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(NVL(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) AS PRDR_DENOM_RAW_COST, 0 AS PRDR_DENOM_BURDENED_COST, ( CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN ( CASE WHEN NVL(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(NVL(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) AS PRDR_FUNC_RAW_COST, ( CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN ( CASE WHEN NVL(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(NVL(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.acct_currency_code,pa_projects_all.projfunc_currency_code,xal.accounting_date),0) AS PRDR_PROJFUNC_RAW_COST, ( CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN ( CASE WHEN NVL(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(NVL(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.acct_currency_code,pa_projects_all.project_currency_code,xal.accounting_date),0) AS PRDR_PROJ_RAW_COST, 0 AS PRDR_FUNC_BURDENED_COST, 0 AS PRDR_PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST, 0 AS PRDR_PROJ_BURDENED_COST, ( CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN PA_COST_DISTRIBUTION_LINES_ALL.ACCT_CURRENCY_CODE ELSE NULL END) AS PRDR_ACCT_CURR_CODE , NULL AS non_billable_code1 -- Classfication code P , NULL AS non_billable_code2 -- Classfication code R , NULL AS non_billable_code3 -- Classfication code W , NULL AS non_billable_code4 -- Classfication code C , NULL AS non_billable_code5 -- Classfication code X , 0 AS NB1_Hours -- Classfication Hours P , 0 AS NB2_Hours -- Classfication Hours R , 0 AS NB3_Hours -- Classfication Hours W , 0 AS NB4_Hours -- Classfication Hours C , 0 AS NB5_Hours -- Classfication Hours X , CASE WHEN FND_USER.USER_NAME = 'CONVERSION' OR PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '%CONVERSION%' OR PEIA.EXPENDITURE_TYPE LIKE 'Conv-%' OR PEIA.BILL_GROUP LIKE 'CH2M-CONVERSION%' THEN 'CONVERSION' ELSE NULL END AS X_CONVERSION_NAME , PAAF.ASS_ATTRIBUTE3 AS X_ASSIGNED_PU_ID , PEIA.ORIG_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE AS X_ORIG_TRANS_REFERENCE , CASE WHEN INSTR ( peia.attribute8, 'JMC LC') > 1 THEN NEXT_DAY (pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.pa_Date - 1, 'FRIDAY') END AS X_CORRECTION_DATE , CASE WHEN xah.gl_transfer_status_code ='Y' THEN xah.gl_transfer_Date END AS X_GL_TRANSFER_DATE , pa_expenditures_all.expenditure_ending_date AS X_EXPENDITURE_END_DATE FROM xla_distribution_links XDL , xla_ae_lines XAL , xla_ae_headers XAH , pa_cost_distribution_lines_all pa_cost_distribution_lines_all , pa_expenditure_items_all peia , pa_projects_all pa_projects_all , gl_ledgers gl_ledgers , gl_code_combinations dr_gl_code_combinations --,JEG_PA_AUTO_ACCT_LKP_SET_V PALKP , JEG_PA_ACCT_CATEGORIES PACT /*Newly added tables*/ , pa_expenditures_all , per_all_people_f incurred_by , pa_implementations_all , PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL , PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES , PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES , BOM_RESOURCES , PO_LINES_ALL POL , PO_LINE_TYPES_B LT , pa_tasks , FND_USER , PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F PAAF WHERE XAH.event_type_code IN ('USG_COST_DIST','USG_COST_DIST_ADJ') AND NVL(peia.transaction_source,'x') != 'FA_DEPREN' --added newly for usg transactions AND XAH.ae_header_id IN (SELECT GT.ae_header_id FROM xla_ae_headers GT WHERE gt.event_type_code IN ('USG_COST_DIST','USG_COST_DIST_ADJ') and exists (SELECT 1 FROM xla_ae_headers XAH , xla_distribution_links XDL , pa_expenditure_items_all PEI WHERE XAH.ae_header_id = GT.ae_header_id and XAH.application_id = GT.application_id --added by Palani and XDL.application_id = XAH.application_id --added by Palani AND XAH.event_type_code IN ('USG_COST_DIST','USG_COST_DIST_ADJ') AND XDL.ae_header_id = XAH.ae_header_id AND PEI.expenditure_item_id = XDL.source_distribution_id_num_1 AND PEI.system_linkage_function = 'USG' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pa_cost_distribution_lines_all CDL WHERE CDL.expenditure_item_id = PEI.expenditure_item_id AND CDL.line_type = 'D' ) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pa_cost_distribution_lines_all CDL WHERE CDL.expenditure_item_id = PEI.expenditure_item_id AND CDL.line_type = 'R' ) ) ) AND XAH.ae_header_id = XDL.ae_headeR_id AND FND_USER.USER_ID(+) = peia.CREATED_BY AND XDL.ae_headeR_id = XAL.ae_header_id AND XDL.ae_line_num = XAL.ae_line_num AND XDL.application_id = XAH.application_id -- Added by Palani 05/03/24 AND XAH.ae_header_id = XAL.ae_headeR_id -- Added by Palani 05/03/24 AND XAH.application_id = XDL.application_id -- Added by Palani 05/03/24 AND XAH.application_id = XAL.application_id -- Added by Palani 05/03/24 AND XDL.application_id = XAL.application_id -- Added by Palani 05/03/24 --AND TRUNC(XAL.CREATION_DATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(l_last_completion_Date) -- AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) --AND peia.org_id = p_org_id AND XDL.source_distribution_id_num_1 = pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.expenditure_item_id AND XDL.source_distribution_id_num_2 = pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_num AND (pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_type = 'R' AND peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG') AND XAL.accounting_class_code = 'COST' AND pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.expenditure_item_id = peia.expenditure_item_id AND peia.project_id = pa_projects_all.project_id --AND XAL.ledger_id = gl_ledgers.ledger_id -- commented by Palani 05/03/24 AND XAH.ledger_id = gl_ledgers.ledger_id -- Added by Palani 05/03/24 --AND XAL.code_combination_id = dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id --AND 'EType||SType Sup Inv Rev DIR' = -- PALKP.segment_Value_lookup_set_name(+) --AND peia.EXPENDITURE_ITEM_ID = -- PALKP.expenditure_item_id(+) AND gl_ledgers.LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE = 'PRIMARY' AND dr_gl_code_combinations.SEGMENT2 BETWEEN PACT.ACCOUNT_FROM(+) AND PACT.ACCOUNT_TO(+) AND PACT.TYPE(+) IS NOT NULL AND dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id = (SELECT NVL ( (CDL2.dr_code_combination_id) ,-1 --pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.dr_code_combination_id ) FROM pa_cost_Distribution_lines_all CDL2 WHERE CDL2.expenditure_item_id = pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.expenditure_item_id AND CDL2.line_type = 'D' AND ROWNUM = 1 ) /*Newly added joins*/ AND peia.expenditure_id = pa_expenditures_all.expenditure_id AND pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_person_id = incurred_by.person_id (+) AND pa_expenditures_all.creation_date <= incurred_by.effective_end_date (+) AND pa_expenditures_all.creation_date >= incurred_by.effective_start_date (+) AND pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_person_id = PAAF.person_id (+) AND TRUNC(pa_expenditures_all.creation_date) <= TRUNC(PAAF.effective_end_date (+)) AND TRUNC(pa_expenditures_all.creation_date) >= TRUNC(PAAF.effective_start_date (+)) AND pa_implementations_all.org_id = pa_projects_all.org_id AND PA_PROJECTS_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE = PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE AND PA_PROJECTS_ALL.ORG_ID = PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.ORG_ID AND peia.EXPENDITURE_TYPE = PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.EXPENDITURE_TYPE AND peia.non_labor_resource = PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.non_labor_resource (+) AND peia.wip_resource_id = BOM_RESOURCES.resource_id (+) AND peia.PO_LINE_ID = POL.PO_LINE_ID (+) AND POL.LINE_TYPE_ID = LT.LINE_TYPE_ID (+) AND peia.task_id = pa_tasks.task_id (+) AND XAL.ACCOUNTING_DATE >= to_date('10/01/2016', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AND ( XAH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE >= to_date('$$MV_LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') OR peia.LAST_UPDATE_DATE >= to_date('$$MV_LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')) --AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ($$X_DIVESTCO_SQL) SQ WHERE SQ.PROJECT_NUMBER = pa_projects_all.SEGMENT1 )--Added for Divestiture logic. UNION ALL --R Flow 2nd union EBS SELECT peia.expenditure_item_id,--USG pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_num, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.creation_date, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.created_by, DECODE(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.transfer_status_code,'B','G', pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.transfer_status_code) transfer_status_code, 0 AS quantity, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.billable_flag, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.program_update_date, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.pa_date, dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id dr_code_combination_id, xal.accounting_date AS gl_date, xal.accounting_date AS recvr_gl_date, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.reversed_flag, pa_projects_all.ORG_ID prj_org_id, --USG pa_projects_all.PROJECT_ID, --USG pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.task_id,--USG pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.denom_currency_code, ( CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.denom_raw_cost ELSE ( CASE WHEN NVL(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(NVL(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) END) AS denom_raw_cost, 0 AS DENOM_BURDENED_COST, peia.project_currency_code,--USG pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_rate_date, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_rate_type, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_exchange_rate, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_cost_exchange_rate, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.work_type_id, --xah.period_name, jeg_get_gl_period(NVL(xal.accounting_date,xah.accounting_date),pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.org_id) recvr_gl_period_name, --nvl(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.recvr_pa_period_name,pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.pa_period_name) recvr_pa_period_name, jeg_get_pa_period(NVL(xal.accounting_date,xah.accounting_date),pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.org_id) recvr_pa_period_name, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_cost_rate_type, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_cost_rate_date, peia.projfunc_currency_code,--USG peia.expenditure_item_date, peia.EXPENDITURE_TYPE ||jeg_get_iws_rec_project(pa_projects_all.segment1,'L',peia.task_id) expenditure_type,--USG NVL(peia.override_to_organization_id, pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_organization_id) expenditure_organization_id, peia.job_id, peia.system_linkage_function, NULL AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, ( CASE WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'ST' THEN 'HOURS' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG' THEN 'USAGE HOURS' WHEN PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.UNIT_OF_MEASURE = 'MILEAGE' THEN 'MILEAGE' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'VI' THEN 'DOLLARS' ELSE PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.UNIT_OF_MEASURE END) NEW_UNIT_OF_MEASURE, NVL(incurred_by.attribute9,0) AS INCURRED_BY_HR_ID, pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_organization_id, 0 AS entered_by, pa_expenditures_all.vendor_id, pa_implementations_all.period_set_name, gl_ledgers.period_set_name, NULL AS PROJECT_ROLE_ID, NULL resource_organization_id, peia.non_labor_resource, ( CASE WHEN peia.system_linkage_function IN ('ER','PJ','BTC') THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function IN ('OT','ST') THEN 'PEOPLE' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'INV' THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS' WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS' WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND NVL(LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE,'NA') <> 'RATE' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE = 'RATE' AND PA_IMPLEMENTATIONS_ALL.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG='Y' THEN 'PEOPLE' WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE = 'RATE' AND PA_IMPLEMENTATIONS_ALL.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG = 'N' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'WIP' AND BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE = 2 THEN 'PEOPLE' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'WIP' AND BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE = 1 THEN 'EQUIPMENT' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'WIP' AND NVL(BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE,0) NOT IN (1,2) THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG' AND PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG = 'N' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG' AND NVL(PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG,'Y') = 'Y' THEN 'EQUIPMENT' ELSE ' ' END) resource_class, peia.wip_resource_id, pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_type, DECODE ( peia.system_linkage_function ,'USG' ,ABS(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.amount) * SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) ) * -1 AS PROJFUNC_RAW_COST, --USG pf_Rawcost SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.amount) * -1 AS PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST,--USG pf_burden DECODE ( peia.system_linkage_function ,'USG' ,ABS(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_raw_cost) * SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) ) * -1 AS PROJECT_RAW_COST, --USG p_rawcost SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(NVL ( pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_burdened_cost ,peia.project_burdened_cost )) * -1 AS PROJECT_BURDENED_COST, --USG p_burden peia.raw_cost_rate, peia.burden_cost_rate, peia.bill_job_id, peia.transaction_source, PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE_CLASS_CODE, '0' AS X_CUSTOM, peia.attribute8, ( CASE WHEN NVL(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(NVL(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) AS denom_raw_cost, peia.cost_burden_distributed_flag, peia.bill_hold_flag, 0 AS BURDEN_COST, peia.cost_dist_rejection_code, peia.cc_cross_charge_code, peia.cc_ic_processed_code, peia.bill_job_billing_title, peia.attribute2, peia.attribute5, peia.cc_cross_charge_type, JEG_GET_CLASS(pa_projects_all.PROJECT_ID, 'Controlling Performance Unit','C'), NULL AS INVOICE_NUM, NULL AS INVOICE_DATE, NULL AS po_num, peia.non_labor_resource, TRIM(dr_gl_code_combinations.segment3), peia.cc_prvdr_organization_id, peia.cc_recvr_organization_id, TRIM(peia.attribute3), gl_ledgers.currency_code AS func_currency_code,--USG (NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) * -1 AS FUNC_BURDENED_COST,--USG f_burden DECODE ( peia.system_linkage_function ,'USG' ,NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0) ) *-1 AS FUNC_RAW_COST, --USG f_Rawcost pa_tasks.customer_id, xal.ae_line_num, 'LABOR_COST' AS source_type, xal.ae_header_id, ( CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS WORKSHARE_FLAG, ( CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN ( CASE WHEN NVL(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(NVL(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) AS PRDR_DENOM_RAW_COST, 0 AS PRDR_DENOM_BURDENED_COST, ( CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN ( CASE WHEN NVL(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(NVL(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) AS PRDR_FUNC_RAW_COST, ( CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN ( CASE WHEN NVL(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(NVL(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.acct_currency_code,pa_projects_all.projfunc_currency_code,xal.accounting_date),0) AS PRDR_PROJFUNC_RAW_COST, ( CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN ( CASE WHEN NVL(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(NVL(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.acct_currency_code,pa_projects_all.project_currency_code,xal.accounting_date),0) AS PRDR_PROJ_RAW_COST, 0 AS PRDR_FUNC_BURDENED_COST, 0 AS PRDR_PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST, 0 AS PRDR_PROJ_BURDENED_COST, ( CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN PA_COST_DISTRIBUTION_LINES_ALL.ACCT_CURRENCY_CODE ELSE NULL END) AS PRDR_ACCT_CURR_CODE , NULL AS non_billable_code1 -- Classfication code P , NULL AS non_billable_code2 -- Classfication code R , NULL AS non_billable_code3 -- Classfication code W , NULL AS non_billable_code4 -- Classfication code C , NULL AS non_billable_code5 -- Classfication code X , 0 AS NB1_Hours -- Classfication Hours P , 0 AS NB2_Hours -- Classfication Hours R , 0 AS NB3_Hours -- Classfication Hours W , 0 AS NB4_Hours -- Classfication Hours C , 0 AS NB5_Hours -- Classfication Hours X , CASE WHEN FND_USER.USER_NAME = 'CONVERSION' OR PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '%CONVERSION%' OR PEIA.EXPENDITURE_TYPE LIKE 'Conv-%' OR PEIA.BILL_GROUP LIKE 'CH2M-CONVERSION%' THEN 'CONVERSION' ELSE NULL END AS X_CONVERSION_NAME , PAAF.ASS_ATTRIBUTE3 AS X_ASSIGNED_PU_ID , peia.ORIG_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE AS X_ORIG_TRANS_REFERENCE , CASE WHEN INSTR ( peia.attribute8, 'JMC LC') > 1 THEN NEXT_DAY (pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.pa_Date - 1, 'FRIDAY') END AS X_CORRECTION_DATE , CASE WHEN xah.gl_transfer_status_code ='Y' THEN xah.gl_transfer_Date END AS X_GL_TRANSFER_DATE , pa_expenditures_all.expenditure_ending_date AS X_EXPENDITURE_END_DATE FROM xla_distribution_links XDL , xla_ae_lines XAL , xla_ae_headers XAH , pa_cost_distribution_lines_all pa_cost_distribution_lines_all , pa_expenditure_items_all peia , pa_projects_all pa_projects_all , gl_ledgers gl_ledgers , gl_code_combinations dr_gl_code_combinations --,JEG_PA_AUTO_ACCT_LKP_SET_V PALKP , JEG_PA_ACCT_CATEGORIES PACT /*Newly added tables*/ , pa_expenditures_all , per_all_people_f incurred_by , pa_implementations_all , PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL , PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES , PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES , BOM_RESOURCES , PO_LINES_ALL POL , PO_LINE_TYPES_B LT , pa_tasks , FND_USER , PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F PAAF WHERE XAH.event_type_code IN ('USG_COST_DIST','USG_COST_DIST_ADJ') --added newly for usg transactions AND XAH.ae_header_id IN (SELECT GT.ae_header_id FROM xla_ae_headers GT WHERE gt.event_type_code IN ('USG_COST_DIST','USG_COST_DIST_ADJ') and EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM xla_ae_headers XAH , xla_distribution_links XDL , pa_expenditure_items_all PEI WHERE XAH.ae_header_id = GT.ae_header_id and XAH.application_id = GT.application_id --added by Palani and XDL.application_id = XAH.application_id --added by Palani AND XAH.event_type_code IN ('USG_COST_DIST','USG_COST_DIST_ADJ') AND XDL.ae_header_id = XAH.ae_header_id AND PEI.expenditure_item_id = XDL.source_distribution_id_num_1 AND PEI.system_linkage_function = 'USG' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pa_cost_distribution_lines_all CDL WHERE CDL.expenditure_item_id = PEI.expenditure_item_id AND CDL.line_type = 'D' ) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pa_cost_distribution_lines_all CDL WHERE CDL.expenditure_item_id = PEI.expenditure_item_id AND CDL.line_type = 'R' ) ) ) -- AND peia.transaction_source != 'FA_DEPREN' AND NVL(peia.transaction_source,'x') != 'FA_DEPREN' AND XAH.ae_header_id = XDL.ae_headeR_id AND FND_USER.USER_ID(+) = peia.CREATED_BY AND XDL.ae_headeR_id = XAL.ae_header_id AND XDL.ae_line_num = XAL.ae_line_num AND XDL.application_id = XAH.application_id -- Added by Palani 05/03/24 AND XAH.ae_header_id = XAL.ae_headeR_id -- Added by Palani 05/03/24 AND XAH.application_id = XDL.application_id -- Added by Palani 05/03/24 AND XAH.application_id = XAL.application_id -- Added by Palani 05/03/24 AND XDL.application_id = XAL.application_id -- Added by Palani 05/03/24 AND XDL.source_distribution_id_num_1 = pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.expenditure_item_id AND XDL.source_distribution_id_num_2 = pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_num AND (pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_type = 'R' AND peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG') AND XAL.accounting_class_code = 'COST' AND pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.expenditure_item_id = peia.expenditure_item_id AND peia.attribute6 = pa_projects_all.segment1 --AND XAL.ledger_id = gl_ledgers.ledger_id -- commented by Palani 05/03/24 AND XAH.ledger_id = gl_ledgers.ledger_id -- Added by Palani 05/03/24 AND gl_ledgers.LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE = 'PRIMARY' AND dr_gl_code_combinations.SEGMENT2 BETWEEN PACT.ACCOUNT_FROM(+) AND PACT.ACCOUNT_TO(+) AND PACT.TYPE(+) IS NOT NULL AND dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id = pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.cr_code_combination_id /*Newly added joins*/ AND peia.expenditure_id = pa_expenditures_all.expenditure_id AND pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_person_id = incurred_by.person_id (+) AND pa_expenditures_all.creation_date <= incurred_by.effective_end_date (+) AND pa_expenditures_all.creation_date >= incurred_by.effective_start_date (+) AND pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_person_id = PAAF.person_id (+) AND TRUNC(pa_expenditures_all.creation_date) <= TRUNC(PAAF.effective_end_date (+)) AND TRUNC(pa_expenditures_all.creation_date) >= TRUNC(PAAF.effective_start_date (+)) AND pa_implementations_all.org_id = pa_projects_all.org_id AND PA_PROJECTS_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE = PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE AND PA_PROJECTS_ALL.ORG_ID = PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.ORG_ID AND peia.EXPENDITURE_TYPE = PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.EXPENDITURE_TYPE AND peia.non_labor_resource = PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.non_labor_resource (+) AND peia.wip_resource_id = BOM_RESOURCES.resource_id (+) AND peia.PO_LINE_ID = POL.PO_LINE_ID (+) AND POL.LINE_TYPE_ID = LT.LINE_TYPE_ID (+) AND peia.task_id = pa_tasks.task_id (+) AND XAL.ACCOUNTING_DATE >= to_date('10/01/2016', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AND ( XAH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE >= to_date('$$MV_LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') OR peia.LAST_UPDATE_DATE >= to_date('$$MV_LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')) --AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ($$X_DIVESTCO_SQL) SQ ----WHERE SQ.PROJECT_NUMBER = pa_projects_all.SEGMENT1 )--Added for Divestiture logic.
